method: Qur'an first; authentic Sunnah; classical tafsir pointers; no Christian CT frame.

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 24 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡأٓخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤۡمِنِينَ
items.tr: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allah and the Last Day," but they are not believers

note.en: Locus Q 2:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hypocrites profess faith while concealing denial. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: ethical.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:8 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hypocrites profess faith while concealing denial)

items.ar: وَإِذَا لَقُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ شَيَٰطِينِهِمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا مَعَكُمۡ إِنَّمَا نَحۡنُ مُسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
items.tr: And when they meet those who believe, they say, "We believe"; but when they are alone with their evil ones, they say, "Indeed, we are with you; we were only mockers

note.en: Locus Q 2:14. Study gloss (not a translation authority): When with believers they say we believe; with devils they wink. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:14 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (When with believers they say we believe; with devils they wink)

items.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱشۡتَرَوُاْ ٱلضَّلَٰلَةَ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ فَمَا رَبِحَت تِّجَٰرَتُهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ
items.tr: Those are the ones who have purchased error [in exchange] for guidance, so their transaction has brought no profit, nor were they guided

note.en: Locus Q 2:16. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Trade guidance for error; profitless commerce. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:16 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Trade guidance for error; profitless commerce)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعۡبُدُواْ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَكُمۡ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَتَّقُونَ
items.tr: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous

note.en: Locus Q 2:21. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Worship your Lord who created you. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological, worship.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:21 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Worship your Lord who created you)

items.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَنقُضُونَ عَهۡدَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مِيثَٰقِهِۦ وَيَقۡطَعُونَ مَآ أَمَرَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦٓ أَن يُوصَلَ وَيُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰسِرُونَ
items.tr: Who break the covenant of Allah after contracting it and sever that which Allah has ordered to be joined and cause corruption on earth. It is those who are the losers

note.en: Locus Q 2:27. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Break Allah's ahd after ratification; sever what Allah joined. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:27 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Break Allah's ahd after ratification; sever what Allah joined)

items.ar: يَٰبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ ٱذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَتِيَ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَنۡعَمۡتُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَأَوۡفُواْ بِعَهۡدِيٓ أُوفِ بِعَهۡدِكُمۡ وَإِيَّـٰيَ فَٱرۡهَبُونِ
items.tr: O Children of Israel, remember My favor which I have bestowed upon you and fulfill My covenant [upon you] that I will fulfill your covenant [from Me], and be afraid of [only] Me

note.en: Locus Q 2:40. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill My ahd; I fulfill yours (Bani Israil). Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:40 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill My ahd; I fulfill yours (Bani Israil))

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ وَرَفَعۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمُ ٱلطُّورَ خُذُواْ مَآ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكُم بِقُوَّةٖ وَٱذۡكُرُواْ مَا فِيهِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَتَّقُونَ
items.tr: And [recall] when We took your covenant, [O Children of Israel, to abide by the Torah] and We raised over you the mount, [saying], "Take what We have given you with determination and remember what is in it that perhaps you may become righteous

note.en: Locus Q 2:63. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Took your mithaq; raised the mountain over you. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:63 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Took your mithaq; raised the mountain over you)

items.ar: وَقَالُواْ لَن تَمَسَّنَا ٱلنَّارُ إِلَّآ أَيَّامٗا مَّعۡدُودَةٗۚ قُلۡ أَتَّخَذۡتُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ عَهۡدٗا فَلَن يُخۡلِفَ ٱللَّهُ عَهۡدَهُۥٓۖ أَمۡ تَقُولُونَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: And they say, "Never will the Fire touch us, except for a few days." Say, "Have you taken a covenant with Allah? For Allah will never break His covenant. Or do you say about Allah that which you do not know

note.en: Locus Q 2:80. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Claimed ahd that Fire touches only numbered days. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:80 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Claimed ahd that Fire touches only numbered days)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ لَا تَعۡبُدُونَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَانٗا وَذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَقُولُواْ لِلنَّاسِ حُسۡنٗا وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا مِّنكُمۡ وَأَنتُم مُّعۡرِضُونَ
items.tr: And [recall] when We took the covenant from the Children of Israel, [enjoining upon them], "Do not worship except Allah; and to parents do good and to relatives, orphans, and the needy. And speak to people good [words] and establish prayer and give zakah." Then you turned away, except a few of you, and you were refusing

note.en: Locus Q 2:83. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq of Bani Israil: worship, prayer, zakah, kindness. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:83 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq of Bani Israil: worship, prayer, zakah, kindness)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ لَا تَسۡفِكُونَ دِمَآءَكُمۡ وَلَا تُخۡرِجُونَ أَنفُسَكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِكُمۡ ثُمَّ أَقۡرَرۡتُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ تَشۡهَدُونَ
items.tr: And [recall] when We took your covenant, [saying], "Do not shed each other's blood or evict one another from your homes." Then you acknowledged [this] while you were witnessing

note.en: Locus Q 2:84. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq: do not shed blood among yourselves. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:84 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq: do not shed blood among yourselves)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ وَرَفَعۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمُ ٱلطُّورَ خُذُواْ مَآ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكُم بِقُوَّةٖ وَٱسۡمَعُواْۖ قَالُواْ سَمِعۡنَا وَعَصَيۡنَا وَأُشۡرِبُواْ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡعِجۡلَ بِكُفۡرِهِمۡۚ قُلۡ بِئۡسَمَا يَأۡمُرُكُم بِهِۦٓ إِيمَٰنُكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
items.tr: And [recall] when We took your covenant and raised over you the mount, [saying], "Take what We have given you with determination and listen." They said [instead], "We hear and disobey." And their hearts absorbed [the worship of] the calf because of their disbelief. Say, "How wretched is that which your faith enjoins upon you, if you should be believers

note.en: Locus Q 2:93. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Took mithaq; raised mountain; then worship calf. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:93 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Took mithaq; raised mountain; then worship calf)

items.ar: أَوَكُلَّمَا عَٰهَدُواْ عَهۡدٗا نَّبَذَهُۥ فَرِيقٞ مِّنۡهُمۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
items.tr: Is it not [true] that every time they took a covenant a party of them threw it away? But, [in fact], most of them do not believe

note.en: Locus Q 2:100. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Whenever they make ahd a party casts it aside. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:100 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Whenever they make ahd a party casts it aside)

items.ar: ۞وَإِذِ ٱبۡتَلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ رَبُّهُۥ بِكَلِمَٰتٖ فَأَتَمَّهُنَّۖ قَالَ إِنِّي جَاعِلُكَ لِلنَّاسِ إِمَامٗاۖ قَالَ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِيۖ قَالَ لَا يَنَالُ عَهۡدِي ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
items.tr: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham was tried by his Lord with commands and he fulfilled them. [Allah] said, "Indeed, I will make you a leader for the people." [Abraham] said, "And of my descendants?" [Allah] said, "My covenant does not include the wrongdoers

note.en: Locus Q 2:124. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Ibrahim's trial; covenantal imamah charge. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:124 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Ibrahim's trial; covenantal imamah charge)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ جَعَلۡنَا ٱلۡبَيۡتَ مَثَابَةٗ لِّلنَّاسِ وَأَمۡنٗا وَٱتَّخِذُواْ مِن مَّقَامِ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ مُصَلّٗىۖ وَعَهِدۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ أَن طَهِّرَا بَيۡتِيَ لِلطَّآئِفِينَ وَٱلۡعَٰكِفِينَ وَٱلرُّكَّعِ ٱلسُّجُودِ
items.tr: And [mention] when We made the House a place of return for the people and [a place of] security. And take, [O believers], from the standing place of Abraham a place of prayer. And We charged Abraham and Ishmael, [saying], "Purify My House for those who perform Tawaf and those who are staying [there] for worship and those who bow and prostrate [in prayer]

note.en: Locus Q 2:125. Study gloss (not a translation authority): We ahidna Ibrahim and Ismail: purify My House. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:125 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (We ahidna Ibrahim and Ismail: purify My House)

items.ar: فَٱذۡكُرُونِيٓ أَذۡكُرۡكُمۡ وَٱشۡكُرُواْ لِي وَلَا تَكۡفُرُونِ
items.tr: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me

note.en: Locus Q 2:152. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Remember Me; I remember you; be grateful. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:152 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Remember Me; I remember you; be grateful)

items.ar: ۞لَّيۡسَ ٱلۡبِرَّ أَن تُوَلُّواْ وُجُوهَكُمۡ قِبَلَ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغۡرِبِ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱلۡبِرَّ مَنۡ ءَامَنَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡأٓخِرِ وَٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ وَٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ وَءَاتَى ٱلۡمَالَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ ذَوِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينَ وَٱبۡنَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَٱلسَّآئِلِينَ وَفِي ٱلرِّقَابِ وَأَقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتَى ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱلۡمُوفُونَ بِعَهۡدِهِمۡ إِذَا عَٰهَدُواْۖ وَٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ فِي ٱلۡبَأۡسَآءِ وَٱلضَّرَّآءِ وَحِينَ ٱلۡبَأۡسِۗ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ صَدَقُواْۖ وَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُتَّقُونَ
items.tr: Righteousness is not that you turn your faces toward the east or the west, but [true] righteousness is [in] one who believes in Allah, the Last Day, the angels, the Book, and the prophets and gives wealth, in spite of love for it, to relatives, orphans, the needy, the traveler, those who ask [for help], and for freeing slaves; [and who] establishes prayer and gives zakah; [those who] fulfill their promise when they promise; and [those who] are patient in poverty and hardship and during battle. Those are the ones who have been true, and it is those who are the righteous

note.en: Locus Q 2:177. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Piety includes fulfilling ahd when pledged. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological, ethical.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:177 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Piety includes fulfilling ahd when pledged)

items.ar: أُحِلَّ لَكُمۡ لَيۡلَةَ ٱلصِّيَامِ ٱلرَّفَثُ إِلَىٰ نِسَآئِكُمۡۚ هُنَّ لِبَاسٞ لَّكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ لِبَاسٞ لَّهُنَّۗ عَلِمَ ٱللَّهُ أَنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَخۡتَانُونَ أَنفُسَكُمۡ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَعَفَا عَنكُمۡۖ فَٱلۡـَٰٔنَ بَٰشِرُوهُنَّ وَٱبۡتَغُواْ مَا كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡۚ وَكُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يَتَبَيَّنَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡخَيۡطُ ٱلۡأَبۡيَضُ مِنَ ٱلۡخَيۡطِ ٱلۡأَسۡوَدِ مِنَ ٱلۡفَجۡرِۖ ثُمَّ أَتِمُّواْ ٱلصِّيَامَ إِلَى ٱلَّيۡلِۚ وَلَا تُبَٰشِرُوهُنَّ وَأَنتُمۡ عَٰكِفُونَ فِي ٱلۡمَسَٰجِدِۗ تِلۡكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَقۡرَبُوهَاۗ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُونَ
items.tr: It has been made permissible for you the night preceding fasting to go to your wives [for sexual relations]. They are clothing for you and you are clothing for them. Allah knows that you used to deceive yourselves, so He accepted your repentance and forgave you. So now, have relations with them and seek that which Allah has decreed for you. And eat and drink until the white thread of dawn becomes distinct to you from the black thread [of night]. Then complete the fast until the sunset. And do not have relations with them as long as you are staying for worship in the mosques. These are the limits [set by] Allah, so do not approach them. Thus does Allah make clear His ordinances to the people that they may become righteous

note.en: Locus Q 2:187. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Marriage limits and garment language. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:187 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Marriage limits and garment language)

items.ar: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُواْ ٱللَّهَ عُرۡضَةٗ لِّأَيۡمَٰنِكُمۡ أَن تَبَرُّواْ وَتَتَّقُواْ وَتُصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِۚ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٞ
items.tr: And do not make [your oath by] Allah an excuse against being righteous and fearing Allah and making peace among people. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing

note.en: Locus Q 2:224. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not make Allah a hindrance to oaths of righteousness. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:224 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not make Allah a hindrance to oaths of righteousness)

items.ar: لَّا يُؤَاخِذُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِٱللَّغۡوِ فِيٓ أَيۡمَٰنِكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَاخِذُكُم بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ قُلُوبُكُمۡۗ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ حَلِيمٞ
items.tr: Allah does not impose blame upon you for what is unintentional in your oaths, but He imposes blame upon you for what your hearts have earned. And Allah is Forgiving and Forbearing

note.en: Locus Q 2:225. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah will not hold you for unintentional oaths. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:225 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah will not hold you for unintentional oaths)

items.ar: وَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فِيمَا عَرَّضۡتُم بِهِۦ مِنۡ خِطۡبَةِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ أَوۡ أَكۡنَنتُمۡ فِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ عَلِمَ ٱللَّهُ أَنَّكُمۡ سَتَذۡكُرُونَهُنَّ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُوَاعِدُوهُنَّ سِرًّا إِلَّآ أَن تَقُولُواْ قَوۡلٗا مَّعۡرُوفٗاۚ وَلَا تَعۡزِمُواْ عُقۡدَةَ ٱلنِّكَاحِ حَتَّىٰ يَبۡلُغَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبُ أَجَلَهُۥۚ وَٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡ فَٱحۡذَرُوهُۚ وَٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ حَلِيمٞ
items.tr: There is no blame upon you for that to which you [indirectly] allude concerning a proposal to women or for what you conceal within yourselves. Allah knows that you will have them in mind. But do not promise them secretly except for saying a proper saying. And do not determine to undertake a marriage contract until the decreed period reaches its end. And know that Allah knows what is within yourselves, so beware of Him. And know that Allah is Forgiving and Forbearing

note.en: Locus Q 2:235. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No sin in hint at engagement before contract. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:235 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No sin in hint at engagement before contract)

items.ar: وَإِن طَلَّقۡتُمُوهُنَّ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن تَمَسُّوهُنَّ وَقَدۡ فَرَضۡتُمۡ لَهُنَّ فَرِيضَةٗ فَنِصۡفُ مَا فَرَضۡتُمۡ إِلَّآ أَن يَعۡفُونَ أَوۡ يَعۡفُوَاْ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِۦ عُقۡدَةُ ٱلنِّكَاحِۚ وَأَن تَعۡفُوٓاْ أَقۡرَبُ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰۚ وَلَا تَنسَوُاْ ٱلۡفَضۡلَ بَيۡنَكُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
items.tr: And if you divorce them before you have touched them and you have already specified for them an obligation, then [give] half of what you specified - unless they forego the right or the one in whose hand is the marriage contract foregoes it. And to forego it is nearer to righteousness. And do not forget graciousness between you. Indeed Allah, of whatever you do, is Seeing

note.en: Locus Q 2:237. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Kindness when dissolving before consummation. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:237 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Kindness when dissolving before consummation)

items.ar: لَآ إِكۡرَاهَ فِي ٱلدِّينِۖ قَد تَّبَيَّنَ ٱلرُّشۡدُ مِنَ ٱلۡغَيِّۚ فَمَن يَكۡفُرۡ بِٱلطَّـٰغُوتِ وَيُؤۡمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ فَقَدِ ٱسۡتَمۡسَكَ بِٱلۡعُرۡوَةِ ٱلۡوُثۡقَىٰ لَا ٱنفِصَامَ لَهَاۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌ
items.tr: There shall be no compulsion in [acceptance of] the religion. The right course has become clear from the wrong. So whoever disbelieves in Taghut and believes in Allah has grasped the most trustworthy handhold with no break in it. And Allah is Hearing and Knowing

note.en: Locus Q 2:256. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No compulsion; urwa wuthqa firm handhold. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:256 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No compulsion; urwa wuthqa firm handhold)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا تَدَايَنتُم بِدَيۡنٍ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗى فَٱكۡتُبُوهُۚ وَلۡيَكۡتُب بَّيۡنَكُمۡ كَاتِبُۢ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِۚ وَلَا يَأۡبَ كَاتِبٌ أَن يَكۡتُبَ كَمَا عَلَّمَهُ ٱللَّهُۚ فَلۡيَكۡتُبۡ وَلۡيُمۡلِلِ ٱلَّذِي عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَلۡيَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّهُۥ وَلَا يَبۡخَسۡ مِنۡهُ شَيۡـٔٗاۚ فَإِن كَانَ ٱلَّذِي عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡحَقُّ سَفِيهًا أَوۡ ضَعِيفًا أَوۡ لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُ أَن يُمِلَّ هُوَ فَلۡيُمۡلِلۡ وَلِيُّهُۥ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِۚ وَٱسۡتَشۡهِدُواْ شَهِيدَيۡنِ مِن رِّجَالِكُمۡۖ فَإِن لَّمۡ يَكُونَا رَجُلَيۡنِ فَرَجُلٞ وَٱمۡرَأَتَانِ مِمَّن تَرۡضَوۡنَ مِنَ ٱلشُّهَدَآءِ أَن تَضِلَّ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا فَتُذَكِّرَ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰۚ وَلَا يَأۡبَ ٱلشُّهَدَآءُ إِذَا مَا دُعُواْۚ وَلَا تَسۡـَٔمُوٓاْ أَن تَكۡتُبُوهُ صَغِيرًا أَوۡ كَبِيرًا إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلِهِۦۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ أَقۡسَطُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَقۡوَمُ لِلشَّهَٰدَةِ وَأَدۡنَىٰٓ أَلَّا تَرۡتَابُوٓاْ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَ تِجَٰرَةً حَاضِرَةٗ تُدِيرُونَهَا بَيۡنَكُمۡ فَلَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ جُنَاحٌ أَلَّا تَكۡتُبُوهَاۗ وَأَشۡهِدُوٓاْ إِذَا تَبَايَعۡتُمۡۚ وَلَا يُضَآرَّ كَاتِبٞ وَلَا شَهِيدٞۚ وَإِن تَفۡعَلُواْ فَإِنَّهُۥ فُسُوقُۢ بِكُمۡۗ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ وَيُعَلِّمُكُمُ ٱللَّهُۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٞ
items.tr: O you who have believed, when you contract a debt for a specified term, write it down. And let a scribe write [it] between you in justice. Let no scribe refuse to write as Allah has taught him. So let him write and let the one who has the obligation dictate. And let him fear Allah, his Lord, and not leave anything out of it. But if the one who has the obligation is of limited understanding or weak or unable to dictate himself, then let his guardian dictate in justice. And bring to witness two witnesses from among your men. And if there are not two men [available], then a man and two women from those whom you accept as witnesses - so that if one of the women errs, then the other can remind her. And let not the witnesses refuse when they are called upon. And do not be [too] weary to write it, whether it is small or large, for its [specified] term. That is more just in the sight of Allah and stronger as evidence and more likely to prevent doubt between you, except when it is an immediate transaction which you conduct among yourselves. For [then] there is no blame upon you if you do not write it. And take witnesses when you conclude a contract. Let no scribe be harmed or any witness. For if you do so, indeed, it is [grave] disobedience in you. And fear Allah. And Allah teaches you. And Allah is Knowing of all things

note.en: Locus Q 2:282. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Write contracts when you incur debt. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:282 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Write contracts when you incur debt)

items.ar: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفۡسًا إِلَّا وُسۡعَهَاۚ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتۡ وَعَلَيۡهَا مَا ٱكۡتَسَبَتۡۗ رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذۡنَآ إِن نَّسِينَآ أَوۡ أَخۡطَأۡنَاۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحۡمِلۡ عَلَيۡنَآ إِصۡرٗا كَمَا حَمَلۡتَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِنَاۚ رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلۡنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِۦۖ وَٱعۡفُ عَنَّا وَٱغۡفِرۡ لَنَا وَٱرۡحَمۡنَآۚ أَنتَ مَوۡلَىٰنَا فَٱنصُرۡنَا عَلَى ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
items.tr: Allah does not charge a soul except [with that within] its capacity. It will have [the consequence of] what [good] it has gained, and it will bear [the consequence of] what [evil] it has earned. "Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we have forgotten or erred. Our Lord, and lay not upon us a burden like that which You laid upon those before us. Our Lord, and burden us not with that which we have no ability to bear. And pardon us; and forgive us; and have mercy upon us. You are our protector, so give us victory over the disbelieving people

note.en: Locus Q 2:286. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah does not burden beyond capacity; no isr as before. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 2:286 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah does not burden beyond capacity; no isr as before)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 10 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: بَلَىٰۚ مَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِعَهۡدِهِۦ وَٱتَّقَىٰ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: But yes, whoever fulfills his commitment and fears Allah - then indeed, Allah loves those who fear Him

note.en: Locus Q 3:76. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Who fulfills ahd and is godfearing. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:76 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Who fulfills ahd and is godfearing)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَشۡتَرُونَ بِعَهۡدِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ ثَمَنٗا قَلِيلًا أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَا خَلَٰقَ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ وَلَا يُكَلِّمُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ وَلَا يَنظُرُ إِلَيۡهِمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وَلَا يُزَكِّيهِمۡ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
items.tr: Indeed, those who exchange the covenant of Allah and their [own] oaths for a small price will have no share in the Hereafter, and Allah will not speak to them or look at them on the Day of Resurrection, nor will He purify them; and they will have a painful punishment

note.en: Locus Q 3:77. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Sell Allah's ahd and oaths for small price. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:77 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Sell Allah's ahd and oaths for small price)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِيثَٰقَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ لَمَآ ءَاتَيۡتُكُم مِّن كِتَٰبٖ وَحِكۡمَةٖ ثُمَّ جَآءَكُمۡ رَسُولٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّمَا مَعَكُمۡ لَتُؤۡمِنُنَّ بِهِۦ وَلَتَنصُرُنَّهُۥۚ قَالَ ءَأَقۡرَرۡتُمۡ وَأَخَذۡتُمۡ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكُمۡ إِصۡرِيۖ قَالُوٓاْ أَقۡرَرۡنَاۚ قَالَ فَٱشۡهَدُواْ وَأَنَا۠ مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰهِدِينَ
items.tr: And [recall, O People of the Scripture], when Allah took the covenant of the prophets, [saying], "Whatever I give you of the Scripture and wisdom and then there comes to you a messenger confirming what is with you, you [must] believe in him and support him." [Allah] said, "Have you acknowledged and taken upon that My commitment?" They said, "We have acknowledged it." He said, "Then bear witness, and I am with you among the witnesses

note.en: Locus Q 3:81. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq of prophets: believe and support confirming messenger. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:81 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq of prophets: believe and support confirming messenger)

items.ar: وَٱعۡتَصِمُواْ بِحَبۡلِ ٱللَّهِ جَمِيعٗا وَلَا تَفَرَّقُواْۚ وَٱذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَتَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِذۡ كُنتُمۡ أَعۡدَآءٗ فَأَلَّفَ بَيۡنَ قُلُوبِكُمۡ فَأَصۡبَحۡتُم بِنِعۡمَتِهِۦٓ إِخۡوَٰنٗا وَكُنتُمۡ عَلَىٰ شَفَا حُفۡرَةٖ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ فَأَنقَذَكُم مِّنۡهَاۗ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُونَ
items.tr: And hold firmly to the rope of Allah all together and do not become divided. And remember the favor of Allah upon you - when you were enemies and He brought your hearts together and you became, by His favor, brothers. And you were on the edge of a pit of the Fire, and He saved you from it. Thus does Allah make clear to you His verses that you may be guided

note.en: Locus Q 3:103. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hold to rope of Allah together; do not divide. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:103 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hold to rope of Allah together; do not divide)

items.ar: وَلۡتَكُن مِّنكُمۡ أُمَّةٞ يَدۡعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡخَيۡرِ وَيَأۡمُرُونَ بِٱلۡمَعۡرُوفِ وَيَنۡهَوۡنَ عَنِ ٱلۡمُنكَرِۚ وَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
items.tr: And let there be [arising] from you a nation inviting to [all that is] good, enjoining what is right and forbidding what is wrong, and those will be the successful

note.en: Locus Q 3:104. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Let there be group calling to good and forbidding wrong. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:104 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Let there be group calling to good and forbidding wrong)

items.ar: كُنتُمۡ خَيۡرَ أُمَّةٍ أُخۡرِجَتۡ لِلنَّاسِ تَأۡمُرُونَ بِٱلۡمَعۡرُوفِ وَتَنۡهَوۡنَ عَنِ ٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَتُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِۗ وَلَوۡ ءَامَنَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ لَكَانَ خَيۡرٗا لَّهُمۚ مِّنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ وَأَكۡثَرُهُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
items.tr: You are the best nation produced [as an example] for mankind. You enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong and believe in Allah. If only the People of the Scripture had believed, it would have been better for them. Among them are believers, but most of them are defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 3:110. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Ummah witness upon mankind if covenant charge upheld. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:110 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Ummah witness upon mankind if covenant charge upheld)

items.ar: فَبِمَا رَحۡمَةٖ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ لِنتَ لَهُمۡۖ وَلَوۡ كُنتَ فَظًّا غَلِيظَ ٱلۡقَلۡبِ لَٱنفَضُّواْ مِنۡ حَوۡلِكَۖ فَٱعۡفُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَهُمۡ وَشَاوِرۡهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَمۡرِۖ فَإِذَا عَزَمۡتَ فَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُتَوَكِّلِينَ
items.tr: So by mercy from Allah, [O Muhammad], you were lenient with them. And if you had been rude [in speech] and harsh in heart, they would have disbanded from about you. So pardon them and ask forgiveness for them and consult them in the matter. And when you have decided, then rely upon Allah. Indeed, Allah loves those who rely [upon Him]

note.en: Locus Q 3:159. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Consult them in affairs; when decided trust Allah. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:159 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Consult them in affairs; when decided trust Allah)

items.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَهِدَ إِلَيۡنَآ أَلَّا نُؤۡمِنَ لِرَسُولٍ حَتَّىٰ يَأۡتِيَنَا بِقُرۡبَانٖ تَأۡكُلُهُ ٱلنَّارُۗ قُلۡ قَدۡ جَآءَكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّن قَبۡلِي بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَبِٱلَّذِي قُلۡتُمۡ فَلِمَ قَتَلۡتُمُوهُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
items.tr: [They are] those who said, "Indeed, Allah has taken our promise not to believe any messenger until he brings us an offering which fire [from heaven] will consume." Say, "There have already come to you messengers before me with clear proofs and [even] that of which you speak. So why did you kill them, if you should be truthful

note.en: Locus Q 3:183. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Claimed divine ahd restricting belief in messengers. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:183 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Claimed divine ahd restricting belief in messengers)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِيثَٰقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ لَتُبَيِّنُنَّهُۥ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَكۡتُمُونَهُۥ فَنَبَذُوهُ وَرَآءَ ظُهُورِهِمۡ وَٱشۡتَرَوۡاْ بِهِۦ ثَمَنٗا قَلِيلٗاۖ فَبِئۡسَ مَا يَشۡتَرُونَ
items.tr: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Allah took a covenant from those who were given the Scripture, [saying], "You must make it clear to the people and not conceal it." But they threw it away behind their backs and exchanged it for a small price. And wretched is that which they purchased

note.en: Locus Q 3:187. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq of People of Book: explain, do not conceal. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:187 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq of People of Book: explain, do not conceal)

items.ar: وَإِنَّ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ لَمَن يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيۡكُمۡ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيۡهِمۡ خَٰشِعِينَ لِلَّهِ لَا يَشۡتَرُونَ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ثَمَنٗا قَلِيلًاۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرُهُمۡ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَرِيعُ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
items.tr: And indeed, among the People of the Scripture are those who believe in Allah and what was revealed to you and what was revealed to them, [being] humbly submissive to Allah. They do not exchange the verses of Allah for a small price. Those will have their reward with their Lord. Indeed, Allah is swift in account

note.en: Locus Q 3:199. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Among People of Book those who believe and fulfill. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 3:199 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Among People of Book those who believe and fulfill)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 13 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَكَيۡفَ تَأۡخُذُونَهُۥ وَقَدۡ أَفۡضَىٰ بَعۡضُكُمۡ إِلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ وَأَخَذۡنَ مِنكُم مِّيثَٰقًا غَلِيظٗا
items.tr: And how could you take it while you have gone in unto each other and they have taken from you a solemn covenant

note.en: Locus Q 4:21. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Marriage mithaq ghaliz between spouses. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological, social.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:21 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Marriage mithaq ghaliz between spouses)

items.ar: وَلِكُلّٖ جَعَلۡنَا مَوَٰلِيَ مِمَّا تَرَكَ ٱلۡوَٰلِدَانِ وَٱلۡأَقۡرَبُونَۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ عَقَدَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمۡ فَـَٔاتُوهُمۡ نَصِيبَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ شَهِيدًا
items.tr: And for all, We have made heirs to what is left by parents and relatives. And to those whom your oaths have bound [to you] - give them their share. Indeed Allah is ever, over all things, a Witness

note.en: Locus Q 4:33. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Inheritance shares as Allah apportioned. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:33 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Inheritance shares as Allah apportioned)

items.ar: ۞وَٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُشۡرِكُواْ بِهِۦ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَٰنٗا وَبِذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَٱلۡجَارِ ذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡجَارِ ٱلۡجُنُبِ وَٱلصَّاحِبِ بِٱلۡجَنۢبِ وَٱبۡنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَمَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمۡۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ مَن كَانَ مُخۡتَالٗا فَخُورًا
items.tr: Worship Allah and associate nothing with Him, and to parents do good, and to relatives, orphans, the needy, the near neighbor, the neighbor farther away, the companion at your side, the traveler, and those whom your right hands possess. Indeed, Allah does not like those who are self-deluding and boastful

note.en: Locus Q 4:36. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Worship Allah; be kind to parents and relatives. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:36 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Worship Allah; be kind to parents and relatives)

items.ar: ۞إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأۡمُرُكُمۡ أَن تُؤَدُّواْ ٱلۡأَمَٰنَٰتِ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهَا وَإِذَا حَكَمۡتُم بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِ أَن تَحۡكُمُواْ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ نِعِمَّا يَعِظُكُم بِهِۦٓۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرٗا
items.tr: Indeed, Allah commands you to render trusts to whom they are due and when you judge between people to judge with justice. Excellent is that which Allah instructs you. Indeed, Allah is ever Hearing and Seeing

note.en: Locus Q 4:58. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Render amanat to those entitled. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:58 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Render amanat to those entitled)

items.ar: وَإِذَا حُيِّيتُم بِتَحِيَّةٖ فَحَيُّواْ بِأَحۡسَنَ مِنۡهَآ أَوۡ رُدُّوهَآۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَسِيبًا
items.tr: And when you are greeted with a greeting, greet [in return] with one better than it or [at least] return it [in a like manner]. Indeed, Allah is ever, over all things, an Accountant

note.en: Locus Q 4:86. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Return greeting with equal or better. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:86 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Return greeting with equal or better)

items.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ يَصِلُونَ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَهُم مِّيثَٰقٌ أَوۡ جَآءُوكُمۡ حَصِرَتۡ صُدُورُهُمۡ أَن يُقَٰتِلُوكُمۡ أَوۡ يُقَٰتِلُواْ قَوۡمَهُمۡۚ وَلَوۡ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَسَلَّطَهُمۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَلَقَٰتَلُوكُمۡۚ فَإِنِ ٱعۡتَزَلُوكُمۡ فَلَمۡ يُقَٰتِلُوكُمۡ وَأَلۡقَوۡاْ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلسَّلَمَ فَمَا جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبِيلٗا
items.tr: Except for those who take refuge with a people between yourselves and whom is a treaty or those who come to you, their hearts strained at [the prospect of] fighting you or fighting their own people. And if Allah had willed, He could have given them power over you, and they would have fought you. So if they remove themselves from you and do not fight you and offer you peace, then Allah has not made for you a cause [for fighting] against them

note.en: Locus Q 4:90. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Except people with whom you have a mithaq. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:90 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Except people with whom you have a mithaq)

items.ar: وَمَا كَانَ لِمُؤۡمِنٍ أَن يَقۡتُلَ مُؤۡمِنًا إِلَّا خَطَـٔٗاۚ وَمَن قَتَلَ مُؤۡمِنًا خَطَـٔٗا فَتَحۡرِيرُ رَقَبَةٖ مُّؤۡمِنَةٖ وَدِيَةٞ مُّسَلَّمَةٌ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن يَصَّدَّقُواْۚ فَإِن كَانَ مِن قَوۡمٍ عَدُوّٖ لَّكُمۡ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَتَحۡرِيرُ رَقَبَةٖ مُّؤۡمِنَةٖۖ وَإِن كَانَ مِن قَوۡمِۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَهُم مِّيثَٰقٞ فَدِيَةٞ مُّسَلَّمَةٌ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ وَتَحۡرِيرُ رَقَبَةٖ مُّؤۡمِنَةٖۖ فَمَن لَّمۡ يَجِدۡ فَصِيَامُ شَهۡرَيۡنِ مُتَتَابِعَيۡنِ تَوۡبَةٗ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
items.tr: And never is it for a believer to kill a believer except by mistake. And whoever kills a believer by mistake - then the freeing of a believing slave and a compensation payment presented to the deceased's family [is required] unless they give [up their right as] charity. But if the deceased was from a people at war with you and he was a believer - then [only] the freeing of a believing slave; and if he was from a people with whom you have a treaty - then a compensation payment presented to his family and the freeing of a believing slave. And whoever does not find [one or cannot afford to buy one] - then [instead], a fast for two months consecutively, [seeking] acceptance of repentance from Allah. And Allah is ever Knowing and Wise

note.en: Locus Q 4:92. Study gloss (not a translation authority): If from people between you and them is mithaq. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:92 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (If from people between you and them is mithaq)

items.ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لِتَحۡكُمَ بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِمَآ أَرَىٰكَ ٱللَّهُۚ وَلَا تَكُن لِّلۡخَآئِنِينَ خَصِيمٗا
items.tr: Indeed, We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], the Book in truth so you may judge between the people by that which Allah has shown you. And do not be for the deceitful an advocate

note.en: Locus Q 4:105. Study gloss (not a translation authority): We sent down Scripture for judging between people. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:105 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (We sent down Scripture for judging between people)

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ سَنُدۡخِلُهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدٗاۖ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقّٗاۚ وَمَنۡ أَصۡدَقُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ قِيلٗا
items.tr: But the ones who believe and do righteous deeds - We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. [It is] the promise of Allah, [which is] truth, and who is more truthful than Allah in statement

note.en: Locus Q 4:122. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Promise of Allah is truth; never breaks His wad. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:122 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Promise of Allah is truth; never breaks His wad)

items.ar: ۞يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُواْ قَوَّـٰمِينَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِ شُهَدَآءَ لِلَّهِ وَلَوۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡ أَوِ ٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ وَٱلۡأَقۡرَبِينَۚ إِن يَكُنۡ غَنِيًّا أَوۡ فَقِيرٗا فَٱللَّهُ أَوۡلَىٰ بِهِمَاۖ فَلَا تَتَّبِعُواْ ٱلۡهَوَىٰٓ أَن تَعۡدِلُواْۚ وَإِن تَلۡوُۥٓاْ أَوۡ تُعۡرِضُواْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٗا
items.tr: O you who have believed, be persistently standing firm in justice, witnesses for Allah, even if it be against yourselves or parents and relatives. Whether one is rich or poor, Allah is more worthy of both. So follow not [personal] inclination, lest you not be just. And if you distort [your testimony] or refuse [to give it], then indeed Allah is ever, with what you do, Acquainted

note.en: Locus Q 4:135. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Stand firm for justice as witnesses to Allah. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:135 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Stand firm for justice as witnesses to Allah)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ فِي ٱلدَّرۡكِ ٱلۡأَسۡفَلِ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَلَن تَجِدَ لَهُمۡ نَصِيرًا
items.tr: Indeed, the hypocrites will be in the lowest depths of the Fire - and never will you find for them a helper

note.en: Locus Q 4:145. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hypocrites in lowest depth of Fire. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:145 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hypocrites in lowest depth of Fire)

items.ar: وَرَفَعۡنَا فَوۡقَهُمُ ٱلطُّورَ بِمِيثَٰقِهِمۡ وَقُلۡنَا لَهُمُ ٱدۡخُلُواْ ٱلۡبَابَ سُجَّدٗا وَقُلۡنَا لَهُمۡ لَا تَعۡدُواْ فِي ٱلسَّبۡتِ وَأَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُم مِّيثَٰقًا غَلِيظٗا
items.tr: And We raised over them the mount for [refusal of] their covenant; and We said to them, "Enter the gate bowing humbly", and We said to them, "Do not transgress on the sabbath", and We took from them a solemn covenant

note.en: Locus Q 4:154. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Raised mountain over them by their mithaq. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:154 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Raised mountain over them by their mithaq)

items.ar: فَبِمَا نَقۡضِهِم مِّيثَٰقَهُمۡ وَكُفۡرِهِم بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَقَتۡلِهِمُ ٱلۡأَنۢبِيَآءَ بِغَيۡرِ حَقّٖ وَقَوۡلِهِمۡ قُلُوبُنَا غُلۡفُۢۚ بَلۡ طَبَعَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهَا بِكُفۡرِهِمۡ فَلَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا
items.tr: And [We cursed them] for their breaking of the covenant and their disbelief in the signs of Allah and their killing of the prophets without right and their saying, "Our hearts are wrapped". Rather, Allah has sealed them because of their disbelief, so they believe not, except for a few

note.en: Locus Q 4:155. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Breaking mithaq and disbelief brought curse. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 4:155 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Breaking mithaq and disbelief brought curse)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 15 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَوۡفُواْ بِٱلۡعُقُودِۚ أُحِلَّتۡ لَكُم بَهِيمَةُ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ إِلَّا مَا يُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَيۡرَ مُحِلِّي ٱلصَّيۡدِ وَأَنتُمۡ حُرُمٌۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحۡكُمُ مَا يُرِيدُ
items.tr: O you who have believed, fulfill [all] contracts. Lawful for you are the animals of grazing livestock except for that which is recited to you [in this Qur'an] - hunting not being permitted while you are in the state of ihram. Indeed, Allah ordains what He intends

note.en: Locus Q 5:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill the contracts (uqud). Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:1 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill the contracts (uqud))

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تُحِلُّواْ شَعَـٰٓئِرَ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا ٱلشَّهۡرَ ٱلۡحَرَامَ وَلَا ٱلۡهَدۡيَ وَلَا ٱلۡقَلَـٰٓئِدَ وَلَآ ءَآمِّينَ ٱلۡبَيۡتَ ٱلۡحَرَامَ يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلٗا مِّن رَّبِّهِمۡ وَرِضۡوَٰنٗاۚ وَإِذَا حَلَلۡتُمۡ فَٱصۡطَادُواْۚ وَلَا يَجۡرِمَنَّكُمۡ شَنَـَٔانُ قَوۡمٍ أَن صَدُّوكُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ أَن تَعۡتَدُواْۘ وَتَعَاوَنُواْ عَلَى ٱلۡبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقۡوَىٰۖ وَلَا تَعَاوَنُواْ عَلَى ٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡعُدۡوَٰنِۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡعِقَابِ
items.tr: O you who have believed, do not violate the rites of Allah or [the sanctity of] the sacred month or [neglect the marking of] the sacrificial animals and garlanding [them] or [violate the safety of] those coming to the Sacred House seeking bounty from their Lord and [His] approval. But when you come out of ihram, then [you may] hunt. And do not let the hatred of a people for having obstructed you from al-Masjid al-Haram lead you to transgress. And cooperate in righteousness and piety, but do not cooperate in sin and aggression. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is severe in penalty

note.en: Locus Q 5:2. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not violate symbols of Allah or sacred months. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:2 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not violate symbols of Allah or sacred months)

items.ar: وَٱذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَةَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَمِيثَٰقَهُ ٱلَّذِي وَاثَقَكُم بِهِۦٓ إِذۡ قُلۡتُمۡ سَمِعۡنَا وَأَطَعۡنَاۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
items.tr: And remember the favor of Allah upon you and His covenant with which He bound you when you said, "We hear and we obey"; and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of that within the breasts

note.axis: Axis 1 — Allah & humanity / Axis 4 — Community / bayah / treaties
note.en: Locus Q 5:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Remember Allah's mithaq He bound you with. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:7 — محور 1,4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Remember Allah's mithaq He bound you with)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُواْ قَوَّـٰمِينَ لِلَّهِ شُهَدَآءَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ وَلَا يَجۡرِمَنَّكُمۡ شَنَـَٔانُ قَوۡمٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَلَّا تَعۡدِلُواْۚ ٱعۡدِلُواْ هُوَ أَقۡرَبُ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: O you who have believed, be persistently standing firm for Allah, witnesses in justice, and do not let the hatred of a people prevent you from being just. Be just; that is nearer to righteousness. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do

note.en: Locus Q 5:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Be just; nearest to taqwa; fear Allah. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:8 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Be just; nearest to taqwa; fear Allah)

items.ar: ۞وَلَقَدۡ أَخَذَ ٱللَّهُ مِيثَٰقَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ وَبَعَثۡنَا مِنۡهُمُ ٱثۡنَيۡ عَشَرَ نَقِيبٗاۖ وَقَالَ ٱللَّهُ إِنِّي مَعَكُمۡۖ لَئِنۡ أَقَمۡتُمُ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتَيۡتُمُ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَءَامَنتُم بِرُسُلِي وَعَزَّرۡتُمُوهُمۡ وَأَقۡرَضۡتُمُ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا لَّأُكَفِّرَنَّ عَنكُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمۡ وَلَأُدۡخِلَنَّكُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۚ فَمَن كَفَرَ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمۡ فَقَدۡ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
items.tr: And Allah had already taken a covenant from the Children of Israel, and We delegated from among them twelve leaders. And Allah said, "I am with you. If you establish prayer and give zakah and believe in My messengers and support them and loan Allah a goodly loan, I will surely remove from you your misdeeds and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow. But whoever of you disbelieves after that has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way

note.en: Locus Q 5:12. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah took mithaq of Bani Israil; twelve chiefs. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:12 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah took mithaq of Bani Israil; twelve chiefs)

items.ar: فَبِمَا نَقۡضِهِم مِّيثَٰقَهُمۡ لَعَنَّـٰهُمۡ وَجَعَلۡنَا قُلُوبَهُمۡ قَٰسِيَةٗۖ يُحَرِّفُونَ ٱلۡكَلِمَ عَن مَّوَاضِعِهِۦ وَنَسُواْ حَظّٗا مِّمَّا ذُكِّرُواْ بِهِۦۚ وَلَا تَزَالُ تَطَّلِعُ عَلَىٰ خَآئِنَةٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا مِّنۡهُمۡۖ فَٱعۡفُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَٱصۡفَحۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
items.tr: So for their breaking of the covenant We cursed them and made their hearts hard. They distort words from their [proper] usages and have forgotten a portion of that of which they were reminded. And you will still observe deceit among them, except a few of them. But pardon them and overlook [their misdeeds]. Indeed, Allah loves the doers of good

note.en: Locus Q 5:13. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Breaking mithaq; cursed; hardened hearts. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:13 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Breaking mithaq; cursed; hardened hearts)

items.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا نَصَٰرَىٰٓ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَهُمۡ فَنَسُواْ حَظّٗا مِّمَّا ذُكِّرُواْ بِهِۦ فَأَغۡرَيۡنَا بَيۡنَهُمُ ٱلۡعَدَاوَةَ وَٱلۡبَغۡضَآءَ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۚ وَسَوۡفَ يُنَبِّئُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَصۡنَعُونَ
items.tr: And from those who say, "We are Christians" We took their covenant; but they forgot a portion of that of which they were reminded. So We caused among them animosity and hatred until the Day of Resurrection. And Allah is going to inform them about what they used to do

note.en: Locus Q 5:14. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq taken from those who say We are Christians. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:14 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq taken from those who say We are Christians)

items.ar: وَكَتَبۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ فِيهَآ أَنَّ ٱلنَّفۡسَ بِٱلنَّفۡسِ وَٱلۡعَيۡنَ بِٱلۡعَيۡنِ وَٱلۡأَنفَ بِٱلۡأَنفِ وَٱلۡأُذُنَ بِٱلۡأُذُنِ وَٱلسِّنَّ بِٱلسِّنِّ وَٱلۡجُرُوحَ قِصَاصٞۚ فَمَن تَصَدَّقَ بِهِۦ فَهُوَ كَفَّارَةٞ لَّهُۥۚ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَحۡكُم بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
items.tr: And We ordained for them therein a life for a life, an eye for an eye, a nose for a nose, an ear for an ear, a tooth for a tooth, and for wounds is legal retribution. But whoever gives [up his right as] charity, it is an expiation for him. And whoever does not judge by what Allah has revealed - then it is those who are the wrongdoers

note.en: Locus Q 5:45. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Upon them in Torah: life for life. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:45 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Upon them in Torah: life for life)

items.ar: وَقَفَّيۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِعِيسَى ٱبۡنِ مَرۡيَمَ مُصَدِّقٗا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِۖ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡإِنجِيلَ فِيهِ هُدٗى وَنُورٞ وَمُصَدِّقٗا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِ وَهُدٗى وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: And We sent, following in their footsteps, Jesus, the son of Mary, confirming that which came before him in the Torah; and We gave him the Gospel, in which was guidance and light and confirming that which preceded it of the Torah as guidance and instruction for the righteous

note.en: Locus Q 5:46. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Isa given Injil confirming Torah. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:46 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Isa given Injil confirming Torah)

items.ar: وَلۡيَحۡكُمۡ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡإِنجِيلِ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ فِيهِۚ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَحۡكُم بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
items.tr: And let the People of the Gospel judge by what Allah has revealed therein. And whoever does not judge by what Allah has revealed - then it is those who are the defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 5:47. Study gloss (not a translation authority): People of Gospel judge by what Allah revealed. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:47 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (People of Gospel judge by what Allah revealed)

items.ar: وَأَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ مُصَدِّقٗا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَمُهَيۡمِنًا عَلَيۡهِۖ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَهُم بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُۖ وَلَا تَتَّبِعۡ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ عَمَّا جَآءَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّۚ لِكُلّٖ جَعَلۡنَا مِنكُمۡ شِرۡعَةٗ وَمِنۡهَاجٗاۚ وَلَوۡ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَجَعَلَكُمۡ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَبۡلُوَكُمۡ فِي مَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمۡۖ فَٱسۡتَبِقُواْ ٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِۚ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ جَمِيعٗا فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ فِيهِ تَخۡتَلِفُونَ
items.tr: And We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], the Book in truth, confirming that which preceded it of the Scripture and as a criterion over it. So judge between them by what Allah has revealed and do not follow their inclinations away from what has come to you of the truth. To each of you We prescribed a law and a method. Had Allah willed, He would have made you one nation [united in religion], but [He intended] to test you in what He has given you; so race to [all that is] good. To Allah is your return all together, and He will [then] inform you concerning that over which you used to differ

note.en: Locus Q 5:48. Study gloss (not a translation authority): To each scripture and method; compete in good. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:48 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (To each scripture and method; compete in good)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مَن يَرۡتَدَّ مِنكُمۡ عَن دِينِهِۦ فَسَوۡفَ يَأۡتِي ٱللَّهُ بِقَوۡمٖ يُحِبُّهُمۡ وَيُحِبُّونَهُۥٓ أَذِلَّةٍ عَلَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ أَعِزَّةٍ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ يُجَٰهِدُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا يَخَافُونَ لَوۡمَةَ لَآئِمٖۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضۡلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤۡتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ وَٰسِعٌ عَلِيمٌ
items.tr: O you who have believed, whoever of you should revert from his religion - Allah will bring forth [in place of them] a people He will love and who will love Him [who are] humble toward the believers, powerful against the disbelievers; they strive in the cause of Allah and do not fear the blame of a critic. That is the favor of Allah; He bestows it upon whom He wills. And Allah is all-Encompassing and Knowing

note.en: Locus Q 5:54. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not turn back on heels after guidance. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:54 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not turn back on heels after guidance)

items.ar: إِنَّمَا وَلِيُّكُمُ ٱللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤۡتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُمۡ رَٰكِعُونَ
items.tr: Your ally is none but Allah and [therefore] His Messenger and those who have believed - those who establish prayer and give zakah, and they bow [in worship]

note.en: Locus Q 5:55. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allies are Allah, Messenger, believers. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:55 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allies are Allah, Messenger, believers)

items.ar: لَقَدۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ وَأَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمۡ رُسُلٗاۖ كُلَّمَا جَآءَهُمۡ رَسُولُۢ بِمَا لَا تَهۡوَىٰٓ أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَرِيقٗا كَذَّبُواْ وَفَرِيقٗا يَقۡتُلُونَ
items.tr: We had already taken the covenant of the Children of Israel and had sent to them messengers. Whenever there came to them a messenger with what their souls did not desire, a party [of messengers] they denied, and another party they killed

note.en: Locus Q 5:70. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Mithaq of Bani Israil; messengers sent; then denial. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:70 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Mithaq of Bani Israil; messengers sent; then denial)

items.ar: لَا يُؤَاخِذُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِٱللَّغۡوِ فِيٓ أَيۡمَٰنِكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَاخِذُكُم بِمَا عَقَّدتُّمُ ٱلۡأَيۡمَٰنَۖ فَكَفَّـٰرَتُهُۥٓ إِطۡعَامُ عَشَرَةِ مَسَٰكِينَ مِنۡ أَوۡسَطِ مَا تُطۡعِمُونَ أَهۡلِيكُمۡ أَوۡ كِسۡوَتُهُمۡ أَوۡ تَحۡرِيرُ رَقَبَةٖۖ فَمَن لَّمۡ يَجِدۡ فَصِيَامُ ثَلَٰثَةِ أَيَّامٖۚ ذَٰلِكَ كَفَّـٰرَةُ أَيۡمَٰنِكُمۡ إِذَا حَلَفۡتُمۡۚ وَٱحۡفَظُوٓاْ أَيۡمَٰنَكُمۡۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُونَ
items.tr: Allah will not impose blame upon you for what is meaningless in your oaths, but He will impose blame upon you for [breaking] what you intended of oaths. So its expiation is the feeding of ten needy people from the average of that which you feed your [own] families or clothing them or the freeing of a slave. But whoever cannot find [or afford it] - then a fast of three days [is required]. That is the expiation for oaths when you have sworn. But guard your oaths. Thus does Allah make clear to you His verses that you may be grateful

note.en: Locus Q 5:89. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Expiation for broken oaths after confirmation. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 5:89 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Expiation for broken oaths after confirmation)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 4 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ۞قُلۡ تَعَالَوۡاْ أَتۡلُ مَا حَرَّمَ رَبُّكُمۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ أَلَّا تُشۡرِكُواْ بِهِۦ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَٰنٗاۖ وَلَا تَقۡتُلُوٓاْ أَوۡلَٰدَكُم مِّنۡ إِمۡلَٰقٖ نَّحۡنُ نَرۡزُقُكُمۡ وَإِيَّاهُمۡۖ وَلَا تَقۡرَبُواْ ٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنۡهَا وَمَا بَطَنَۖ وَلَا تَقۡتُلُواْ ٱلنَّفۡسَ ٱلَّتِي حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُونَ
items.tr: Say, "Come, I will recite what your Lord has prohibited to you. [He commands] that you not associate anything with Him, and to parents, good treatment, and do not kill your children out of poverty; We will provide for you and them. And do not approach immoralities - what is apparent of them and what is concealed. And do not kill the soul which Allah has forbidden [to be killed] except by [legal] right. This has He instructed you that you may use reason

note.en: Locus Q 6:151. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Sayings of covenant: tawhid ethics and justice. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 6:151 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Sayings of covenant: tawhid ethics and justice)

items.ar: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُواْ مَالَ ٱلۡيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِي هِيَ أَحۡسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبۡلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥۚ وَأَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ وَٱلۡمِيزَانَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفۡسًا إِلَّا وُسۡعَهَاۖ وَإِذَا قُلۡتُمۡ فَٱعۡدِلُواْ وَلَوۡ كَانَ ذَا قُرۡبَىٰۖ وَبِعَهۡدِ ٱللَّهِ أَوۡفُواْۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
items.tr: And do not approach the orphan's property except in a way that is best until he reaches maturity. And give full measure and weight in justice. We do not charge any soul except [with that within] its capacity. And when you testify, be just, even if [it concerns] a near relative. And the covenant of Allah fulfill. This has He instructed you that you may remember

note.en: Locus Q 6:152. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill Allah's ahd; He enjoined this upon you. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 6:152 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill Allah's ahd; He enjoined this upon you)

items.ar: وَأَنَّ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطِي مُسۡتَقِيمٗا فَٱتَّبِعُوهُۖ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُواْ ٱلسُّبُلَ فَتَفَرَّقَ بِكُمۡ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ وَصَّىٰكُم بِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَتَّقُونَ
items.tr: And, [moreover], this is My path, which is straight, so follow it; and do not follow [other] ways, for you will be separated from His way. This has He instructed you that you may become righteous

note.en: Locus Q 6:153. Study gloss (not a translation authority): This is My path straight; follow; do not divide. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 6:153 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (This is My path straight; follow; do not divide)

items.ar: ثُمَّ ءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَى ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ تَمَامًا عَلَى ٱلَّذِيٓ أَحۡسَنَ وَتَفۡصِيلٗا لِّكُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَهُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٗ لَّعَلَّهُم بِلِقَآءِ رَبِّهِمۡ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
items.tr: Then We gave Moses the Scripture, making complete [Our favor] upon the one who did good and as a detailed explanation of all things and as guidance and mercy that perhaps in [the matter of] the meeting with their Lord they would believe

note.en: Locus Q 6:154. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Musa given Scripture completing favor. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 6:154 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Musa given Scripture completing favor)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 7 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَمَا وَجَدۡنَا لِأَكۡثَرِهِم مِّنۡ عَهۡدٖۖ وَإِن وَجَدۡنَآ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَفَٰسِقِينَ
items.tr: And We did not find for most of them any covenant; but indeed, We found most of them defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 7:102. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Most of them not found keeping covenant. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:102 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Most of them not found keeping covenant)
