items.ar: وَلَمَّا وَقَعَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّجۡزُ قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَى ٱدۡعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِندَكَۖ لَئِن كَشَفۡتَ عَنَّا ٱلرِّجۡزَ لَنُؤۡمِنَنَّ لَكَ وَلَنُرۡسِلَنَّ مَعَكَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
items.tr: And when the punishment descended upon them, they said, "O Moses, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. If you [can] remove the punishment from us, we will surely believe you, and we will send with you the Children of Israel

note.en: Locus Q 7:134. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Plea to remove torment linked to covenanted belief. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:134 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Plea to remove torment linked to covenanted belief)

items.ar: وَكَتَبۡنَا لَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡأَلۡوَاحِ مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ مَّوۡعِظَةٗ وَتَفۡصِيلٗا لِّكُلِّ شَيۡءٖ فَخُذۡهَا بِقُوَّةٖ وَأۡمُرۡ قَوۡمَكَ يَأۡخُذُواْ بِأَحۡسَنِهَاۚ سَأُوْرِيكُمۡ دَارَ ٱلۡفَٰسِقِينَ
items.tr: And We wrote for him on the tablets [something] of all things - instruction and explanation for all things, [saying], "Take them with determination and order your people to take the best of it. I will show you the home of the defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 7:145. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Tablets written for Mosa — mercy and detail. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:145 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Tablets written for Mosa — mercy and detail)

items.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ ٱلنَّبِيَّ ٱلۡأُمِّيَّ ٱلَّذِي يَجِدُونَهُۥ مَكۡتُوبًا عِندَهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِ وَٱلۡإِنجِيلِ يَأۡمُرُهُم بِٱلۡمَعۡرُوفِ وَيَنۡهَىٰهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَيُحِلُّ لَهُمُ ٱلطَّيِّبَٰتِ وَيُحَرِّمُ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡخَبَـٰٓئِثَ وَيَضَعُ عَنۡهُمۡ إِصۡرَهُمۡ وَٱلۡأَغۡلَٰلَ ٱلَّتِي كَانَتۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِهِۦ وَعَزَّرُوهُ وَنَصَرُوهُ وَٱتَّبَعُواْ ٱلنُّورَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أُنزِلَ مَعَهُۥٓ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
items.tr: Those who follow the Messenger, the unlettered prophet, whom they find written in what they have of the Torah and the Gospel, who enjoins upon them what is right and forbids them what is wrong and makes lawful for them the good things and prohibits for them the evil and relieves them of their burden and the shackles which were upon them. So they who have believed in him, honored him, supported him and followed the light which was sent down with him - it is those who will be the successful

note.en: Locus Q 7:157. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Relief from burdens and shackles upon the Messenger. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:157 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Relief from burdens and shackles upon the Messenger)

items.ar: فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡ خَلۡفٞ وَرِثُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَأۡخُذُونَ عَرَضَ هَٰذَا ٱلۡأَدۡنَىٰ وَيَقُولُونَ سَيُغۡفَرُ لَنَا وَإِن يَأۡتِهِمۡ عَرَضٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥ يَأۡخُذُوهُۚ أَلَمۡ يُؤۡخَذۡ عَلَيۡهِم مِّيثَٰقُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن لَّا يَقُولُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَقَّ وَدَرَسُواْ مَا فِيهِۗ وَٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
items.tr: And there followed them successors who inherited the Scripture [while] taking the commodities of this lower life and saying, "It will be forgiven for us." And if an offer like it comes to them, they will [again] take it. Was not the covenant of the Scripture taken from them that they would not say about Allah except the truth, and they studied what was in it? And the home of the Hereafter is better for those who fear Allah, so will you not use reason

note.en: Locus Q 7:169. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Did not mithaq of Book bind them to Book of Allah. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:169 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Did not mithaq of Book bind them to Book of Allah)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنۢ بَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ مِن ظُهُورِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ وَأَشۡهَدَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ أَلَسۡتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ شَهِدۡنَآۚ أَن تَقُولُواْ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّا كُنَّا عَنۡ هَٰذَا غَٰفِلِينَ
items.tr: And [mention] when your Lord took from the children of Adam - from their loins - their descendants and made them testify of themselves, [saying to them], "Am I not your Lord?" They said, "Yes, we have testified." [This] - lest you should say on the day of Resurrection, "Indeed, we were of this unaware

note.en: Locus Q 7:172. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Alast: lordship question and testimony of progeny. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:172 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Alast: lordship question and testimony of progeny)

items.ar: أَوۡ تَقُولُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَشۡرَكَ ءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ وَكُنَّا ذُرِّيَّةٗ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡۖ أَفَتُهۡلِكُنَا بِمَا فَعَلَ ٱلۡمُبۡطِلُونَ
items.tr: Or [lest] you say, "It was only that our fathers associated [others in worship] with Allah before, and we were but descendants after them. Then would You destroy us for what the falsifiers have done

note.en: Locus Q 7:173. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Anti-excuse clauses for Day of Resurrection. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 7:173 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Anti-excuse clauses for Day of Resurrection)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 5 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تَخُونُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلرَّسُولَ وَتَخُونُوٓاْ أَمَٰنَٰتِكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: O you who have believed, do not betray Allah and the Messenger or betray your trusts while you know [the consequence]

note.en: Locus Q 8:27. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not betray amanah of Allah and the Messenger. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 8:27 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not betray amanah of Allah and the Messenger)

items.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ عَٰهَدتَّ مِنۡهُمۡ ثُمَّ يَنقُضُونَ عَهۡدَهُمۡ فِي كُلِّ مَرَّةٖ وَهُمۡ لَا يَتَّقُونَ
items.tr: The ones with whom you made a treaty but then they break their pledge every time, and they do not fear Allah

note.en: Locus Q 8:56. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Those with whom you made ahd then break repeatedly. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 8:56 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Those with whom you made ahd then break repeatedly)

items.ar: وَإِمَّا تَخَافَنَّ مِن قَوۡمٍ خِيَانَةٗ فَٱنۢبِذۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ عَلَىٰ سَوَآءٍۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلۡخَآئِنِينَ
items.tr: If you [have reason to] fear from a people betrayal, throw [their treaty] back to them, [putting you] on equal terms. Indeed, Allah does not like traitors

note.en: Locus Q 8:58. Study gloss (not a translation authority): If treachery feared from ahd-party, announce equally. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 8:58 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (If treachery feared from ahd-party, announce equally)

items.ar: وَأَعِدُّواْ لَهُم مَّا ٱسۡتَطَعۡتُم مِّن قُوَّةٖ وَمِن رِّبَاطِ ٱلۡخَيۡلِ تُرۡهِبُونَ بِهِۦ عَدُوَّ ٱللَّهِ وَعَدُوَّكُمۡ وَءَاخَرِينَ مِن دُونِهِمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُونَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُهُمۡۚ وَمَا تُنفِقُواْ مِن شَيۡءٖ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ يُوَفَّ إِلَيۡكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ لَا تُظۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: And prepare against them whatever you are able of power and of steeds of war by which you may terrify the enemy of Allah and your enemy and others besides them whom you do not know [but] whom Allah knows. And whatever you spend in the cause of Allah will be fully repaid to you, and you will not be wronged

note.en: Locus Q 8:60. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Prepare strength to deter enemy and ally of Allah. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 8:60 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Prepare strength to deter enemy and ally of Allah)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَهَاجَرُواْ وَجَٰهَدُواْ بِأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَأَنفُسِهِمۡ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَاوَواْ وَّنَصَرُوٓاْ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ أَوۡلِيَآءُ بَعۡضٖۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَلَمۡ يُهَاجِرُواْ مَا لَكُم مِّن وَلَٰيَتِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٍ حَتَّىٰ يُهَاجِرُواْۚ وَإِنِ ٱسۡتَنصَرُوكُمۡ فِي ٱلدِّينِ فَعَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلنَّصۡرُ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ قَوۡمِۭ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَبَيۡنَهُم مِّيثَٰقٞۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞ
items.tr: Indeed, those who have believed and emigrated and fought with their wealth and lives in the cause of Allah and those who gave shelter and aided - they are allies of one another. But those who believed and did not emigrate - for you there is no guardianship of them until they emigrate. And if they seek help of you for the religion, then you must help, except against a people between yourselves and whom is a treaty. And Allah is Seeing of what you do

note.en: Locus Q 8:72. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Alliance field until hijrah; read with siyar tafsir. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 8:72 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Alliance field until hijrah; read with siyar tafsir)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 16 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: بَرَآءَةٞ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ عَٰهَدتُّم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ
items.tr: [This is a declaration of] disassociation, from Allah and His Messenger, to those with whom you had made a treaty among the polytheists

note.en: Locus Q 9:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Release from ahd with mushrikin after four months. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:1 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Release from ahd with mushrikin after four months)

items.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ عَٰهَدتُّم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَنقُصُوكُمۡ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَمۡ يُظَٰهِرُواْ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَحَدٗا فَأَتِمُّوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِمۡ عَهۡدَهُمۡ إِلَىٰ مُدَّتِهِمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: Excepted are those with whom you made a treaty among the polytheists and then they have not been deficient toward you in anything or supported anyone against you; so complete for them their treaty until their term [has ended]. Indeed, Allah loves the righteous [who fear Him]

note.en: Locus Q 9:4. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Except those with ahd until term; then fulfill. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:4 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Except those with ahd until term; then fulfill)

items.ar: وَإِنۡ أَحَدٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ ٱسۡتَجَارَكَ فَأَجِرۡهُ حَتَّىٰ يَسۡمَعَ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ أَبۡلِغۡهُ مَأۡمَنَهُۥۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَوۡمٞ لَّا يَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: And if any one of the polytheists seeks your protection, then grant him protection so that he may hear the words of Allah. Then deliver him to his place of safety. That is because they are a people who do not know

note.en: Locus Q 9:6. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Asylum for muahid seeking to hear Quran. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:6 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Asylum for muahid seeking to hear Quran)

items.ar: كَيۡفَ يَكُونُ لِلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ عَهۡدٌ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَعِندَ رَسُولِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ عَٰهَدتُّمۡ عِندَ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِۖ فَمَا ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ لَكُمۡ فَٱسۡتَقِيمُواْ لَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: How can there be for the polytheists a treaty in the sight of Allah and with His Messenger, except for those with whom you made a treaty at al-Masjid al-Haram? So as long as they are upright toward you, be upright toward them. Indeed, Allah loves the righteous [who fear Him]

note.en: Locus Q 9:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No ahd for mushrikin except at Masjid al-Haram. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:7 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No ahd for mushrikin except at Masjid al-Haram)

items.ar: كَيۡفَ وَإِن يَظۡهَرُواْ عَلَيۡكُمۡ لَا يَرۡقُبُواْ فِيكُمۡ إِلّٗا وَلَا ذِمَّةٗۚ يُرۡضُونَكُم بِأَفۡوَٰهِهِمۡ وَتَأۡبَىٰ قُلُوبُهُمۡ وَأَكۡثَرُهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
items.tr: How [can there be a treaty] while, if they gain dominance over you, they do not observe concerning you any pact of kinship or covenant of protection? They satisfy you with their mouths, but their hearts refuse [compliance], and most of them are defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 9:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): They prefer you not to believe; break oaths repeatedly. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:8 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (They prefer you not to believe; break oaths repeatedly)

items.ar: لَا يَرۡقُبُونَ فِي مُؤۡمِنٍ إِلّٗا وَلَا ذِمَّةٗۚ وَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُعۡتَدُونَ
items.tr: They do not observe toward a believer any pact of kinship or covenant of protection. And it is they who are the transgressors

note.en: Locus Q 9:10. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not respect kinship or treaty with believers. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:10 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not respect kinship or treaty with believers)

items.ar: وَإِن نَّكَثُوٓاْ أَيۡمَٰنَهُم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ عَهۡدِهِمۡ وَطَعَنُواْ فِي دِينِكُمۡ فَقَٰتِلُوٓاْ أَئِمَّةَ ٱلۡكُفۡرِ إِنَّهُمۡ لَآ أَيۡمَٰنَ لَهُمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَنتَهُونَ
items.tr: And if they break their oaths after their treaty and defame your religion, then fight the leaders of disbelief, for indeed, there are no oaths [sacred] to them; [fight them that] they might cease

note.en: Locus Q 9:12. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Break oaths after ahd; attack religion. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:12 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Break oaths after ahd; attack religion)

items.ar: أَلَا تُقَٰتِلُونَ قَوۡمٗا نَّكَثُوٓاْ أَيۡمَٰنَهُمۡ وَهَمُّواْ بِإِخۡرَاجِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَهُم بَدَءُوكُمۡ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۚ أَتَخۡشَوۡنَهُمۡۚ فَٱللَّهُ أَحَقُّ أَن تَخۡشَوۡهُ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
items.tr: Would you not fight a people who broke their oaths and determined to expel the Messenger, and they had begun [the attack upon] you the first time? Do you fear them? But Allah has more right that you should fear Him, if you are [truly] believers

note.en: Locus Q 9:13. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Will you not fight people who broke oaths. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:13 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Will you not fight people who broke oaths)

items.ar: أَمۡ حَسِبۡتُمۡ أَن تُتۡرَكُواْ وَلَمَّا يَعۡلَمِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ جَٰهَدُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَتَّخِذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا رَسُولِهِۦ وَلَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَلِيجَةٗۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: Do you think that you will be left [as you are] while Allah has not yet made evident those among you who strive [for His cause] and do not take other than Allah, His Messenger and the believers as intimates? And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

note.en: Locus Q 9:16. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do you think you will be left without trial. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:16 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do you think you will be left without trial)

items.ar: ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتُ بَعۡضُهُم مِّنۢ بَعۡضٖۚ يَأۡمُرُونَ بِٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَيَنۡهَوۡنَ عَنِ ٱلۡمَعۡرُوفِ وَيَقۡبِضُونَ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡۚ نَسُواْ ٱللَّهَ فَنَسِيَهُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ هُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
items.tr: The hypocrite men and hypocrite women are of one another. They enjoin what is wrong and forbid what is right and close their hands. They have forgotten Allah, so He has forgotten them [accordingly]. Indeed, the hypocrites - it is they who are the defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 9:67. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hypocrites enjoin wrong and forbid right. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:67 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hypocrites enjoin wrong and forbid right)

items.ar: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتِ وَٱلۡكُفَّارَ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ هِيَ حَسۡبُهُمۡۚ وَلَعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُۖ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مُّقِيمٞ
items.tr: Allah has promised the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the disbelievers the fire of Hell, wherein they will abide eternally. It is sufficient for them. And Allah has cursed them, and for them is an enduring punishment

note.en: Locus Q 9:68. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah promises hypocrites Fire lowest depth. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:68 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah promises hypocrites Fire lowest depth)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِيُّ جَٰهِدِ ٱلۡكُفَّارَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱغۡلُظۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَمَأۡوَىٰهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
items.tr: O Prophet, fight against the disbelievers and the hypocrites and be harsh upon them. And their refuge is Hell, and wretched is the destination

note.en: Locus Q 9:73. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Strive against hypocrites and polytheists. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:73 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Strive against hypocrites and polytheists)

items.ar: ۞وَمِنۡهُم مَّنۡ عَٰهَدَ ٱللَّهَ لَئِنۡ ءَاتَىٰنَا مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ لَنَصَّدَّقَنَّ وَلَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
items.tr: And among them are those who made a covenant with Allah, [saying], "If He should give us from His bounty, we will surely spend in charity, and we will surely be among the righteous

note.en: Locus Q 9:75. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Some made ahd with Allah: if given wealth we will spend. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:75 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Some made ahd with Allah: if given wealth we will spend)

items.ar: فَأَعۡقَبَهُمۡ نِفَاقٗا فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يَلۡقَوۡنَهُۥ بِمَآ أَخۡلَفُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا وَعَدُوهُ وَبِمَا كَانُواْ يَكۡذِبُونَ
items.tr: So He penalized them with hypocrisy in their hearts until the Day they will meet Him - because they failed Allah in what they promised Him and because they [habitually] used to lie

note.en: Locus Q 9:77. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hypocrisy sealed for breaking what they ahadu Allah. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:77 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hypocrisy sealed for breaking what they ahadu Allah)

items.ar: يَحۡلِفُونَ لَكُمۡ لِتَرۡضَوۡاْ عَنۡهُمۡۖ فَإِن تَرۡضَوۡاْ عَنۡهُمۡ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَرۡضَىٰ عَنِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلۡفَٰسِقِينَ
items.tr: They swear to you so that you might be satisfied with them. But if you should be satisfied with them - indeed, Allah is not satisfied with a defiantly disobedient people

note.en: Locus Q 9:96. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hard against disbelievers; merciful among themselves. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:96 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hard against disbelievers; merciful among themselves)

items.ar: ۞إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱشۡتَرَىٰ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ أَنفُسَهُمۡ وَأَمۡوَٰلَهُم بِأَنَّ لَهُمُ ٱلۡجَنَّةَۚ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَيَقۡتُلُونَ وَيُقۡتَلُونَۖ وَعۡدًا عَلَيۡهِ حَقّٗا فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِ وَٱلۡإِنجِيلِ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِۚ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِعَهۡدِهِۦ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۚ فَٱسۡتَبۡشِرُواْ بِبَيۡعِكُمُ ٱلَّذِي بَايَعۡتُم بِهِۦۚ وَذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
items.tr: Indeed, Allah has purchased from the believers their lives and their properties [in exchange] for that they will have Paradise. They fight in the cause of Allah, so they kill and are killed. [It is] a true promise [binding] upon Him in the Torah and the Gospel and the Qur'an. And who is truer to his covenant than Allah? So rejoice in your transaction which you have contracted. And it is that which is the great attainment

note.en: Locus Q 9:111. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah purchased believers' lives and wealth for Paradise. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 9:111 — محور 1,6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah purchased believers' lives and wealth for Paradise)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٖ رَّسُولٞۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ رَسُولُهُمۡ قُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُم بِٱلۡقِسۡطِ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: And for every nation is a messenger. So when their messenger comes, it will be judged between them in justice, and they will not be wronged

note.en: Locus Q 10:47. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Messenger for every nation; obey when sent. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 10:47 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Messenger for every nation; obey when sent)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: أَفَمَن كَانَ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ وَيَتۡلُوهُ شَاهِدٞ مِّنۡهُ وَمِن قَبۡلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِمَامٗا وَرَحۡمَةًۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦۚ وَمَن يَكۡفُرۡ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابِ فَٱلنَّارُ مَوۡعِدُهُۥۚ فَلَا تَكُ فِي مِرۡيَةٖ مِّنۡهُۚ إِنَّهُ ٱلۡحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
items.tr: So is one who [stands] upon a clear evidence from his Lord [like the aforementioned]? And a witness from Him follows it, and before it was the Scripture of Moses to lead and as mercy. Those [believers in the former revelations] believe in the Qur'an. But whoever disbelieves in it from the [various] factions - the Fire is his promised destination. So be not in doubt about it. Indeed, it is the truth from your Lord, but most of the people do not believe

note.en: Locus Q 11:17. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Witness from Allah like one with Scripture. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 11:17 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Witness from Allah like one with Scripture)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: قَالَ لَنۡ أُرۡسِلَهُۥ مَعَكُمۡ حَتَّىٰ تُؤۡتُونِ مَوۡثِقٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ لَتَأۡتُنَّنِي بِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن يُحَاطَ بِكُمۡۖ فَلَمَّآ ءَاتَوۡهُ مَوۡثِقَهُمۡ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مَا نَقُولُ وَكِيلٞ
items.tr: [Jacob] said, "Never will I send him with you until you give me a promise by Allah that you will bring him [back] to me, unless you should be surrounded by enemies." And when they had given their promise, he said, "Allah, over what we say, is Witness

note.en: Locus Q 12:66. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Yaqub takes mawthiq from sons regarding Benjamin. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 12:66 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Yaqub takes mawthiq from sons regarding Benjamin)

items.ar: فَلَمَّا ٱسۡتَيۡـَٔسُواْ مِنۡهُ خَلَصُواْ نَجِيّٗاۖ قَالَ كَبِيرُهُمۡ أَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ أَبَاكُمۡ قَدۡ أَخَذَ عَلَيۡكُم مَّوۡثِقٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَمِن قَبۡلُ مَا فَرَّطتُمۡ فِي يُوسُفَۖ فَلَنۡ أَبۡرَحَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ حَتَّىٰ يَأۡذَنَ لِيٓ أَبِيٓ أَوۡ يَحۡكُمَ ٱللَّهُ لِيۖ وَهُوَ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡحَٰكِمِينَ
items.tr: So when they had despaired of him, they secluded themselves in private consultation. The eldest of them said, "Do you not know that your father has taken upon you an oath by Allah and [that] before you failed in [your duty to] Joseph? So I will never leave [this] land until my father permits me or Allah decides for me, and He is the best of judges

note.en: Locus Q 12:80. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Will not leave land until father permits or Allah decides. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 12:80 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Will not leave land until father permits or Allah decides)

items.ar: لَقَدۡ كَانَ فِي قَصَصِهِمۡ عِبۡرَةٞ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِۗ مَا كَانَ حَدِيثٗا يُفۡتَرَىٰ وَلَٰكِن تَصۡدِيقَ ٱلَّذِي بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِ وَتَفۡصِيلَ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَهُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٗ لِّقَوۡمٖ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
items.tr: There was certainly in their stories a lesson for those of understanding. Never was the Qur'an a narration invented, but a confirmation of what was before it and a detailed explanation of all things and guidance and mercy for a people who believe

note.en: Locus Q 12:111. Study gloss (not a translation authority): In their stories instruction for ulu albab. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 12:111 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (In their stories instruction for ulu albab)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يُوفُونَ بِعَهۡدِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا يَنقُضُونَ ٱلۡمِيثَٰقَ
items.tr: Those who fulfill the covenant of Allah and do not break the contract

note.en: Locus Q 13:20. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill ahd of Allah; do not break mithaq. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 13:20 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill ahd of Allah; do not break mithaq)

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَنقُضُونَ عَهۡدَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مِيثَٰقِهِۦ وَيَقۡطَعُونَ مَآ أَمَرَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦٓ أَن يُوصَلَ وَيُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱللَّعۡنَةُ وَلَهُمۡ سُوٓءُ ٱلدَّارِ
items.tr: But those who break the covenant of Allah after contracting it and sever that which Allah has ordered to be joined and spread corruption on earth - for them is the curse, and they will have the worst home

note.en: Locus Q 13:25. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Break ahd after ratification; cut what Allah joined. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 13:25 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Break ahd after ratification; cut what Allah joined)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَقَالَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ لَمَّا قُضِيَ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَعَدَكُمۡ وَعۡدَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَوَعَدتُّكُمۡ فَأَخۡلَفۡتُكُمۡۖ وَمَا كَانَ لِيَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّن سُلۡطَٰنٍ إِلَّآ أَن دَعَوۡتُكُمۡ فَٱسۡتَجَبۡتُمۡ لِيۖ فَلَا تَلُومُونِي وَلُومُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۖ مَّآ أَنَا۠ بِمُصۡرِخِكُمۡ وَمَآ أَنتُم بِمُصۡرِخِيَّ إِنِّي كَفَرۡتُ بِمَآ أَشۡرَكۡتُمُونِ مِن قَبۡلُۗ إِنَّ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
items.tr: And Satan will say when the matter has been concluded, "Indeed, Allah had promised you the promise of truth. And I promised you, but I betrayed you. But I had no authority over you except that I invited you, and you responded to me. So do not blame me; but blame yourselves. I cannot be called to your aid, nor can you be called to my aid. Indeed, I deny your association of me [with Allah] before. Indeed, for the wrongdoers is a painful punishment

note.en: Locus Q 14:22. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Shaytan's broken wad on Day of Judgment. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 14:22 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Shaytan's broken wad on Day of Judgment)

items.ar: وَءَاتَىٰكُم مِّن كُلِّ مَا سَأَلۡتُمُوهُۚ وَإِن تَعُدُّواْ نِعۡمَتَ ٱللَّهِ لَا تُحۡصُوهَآۗ إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ لَظَلُومٞ كَفَّارٞ
items.tr: And He gave you from all you asked of Him. And if you should count the favor of Allah, you could not enumerate them. Indeed, mankind is [generally] most unjust and ungrateful

note.en: Locus Q 14:34. Study gloss (not a translation authority): If you count favors of Allah you cannot enumerate. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 14:34 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (If you count favors of Allah you cannot enumerate)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 6 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ۞إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأۡمُرُ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَٱلۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
items.tr: Indeed, Allah orders justice and good conduct and giving to relatives and forbids immorality and bad conduct and oppression. He admonishes you that perhaps you will be reminded

note.en: Locus Q 16:90. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah commands justice, ihsan, and giving to kin. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:90 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah commands justice, ihsan, and giving to kin)

items.ar: وَأَوۡفُواْ بِعَهۡدِ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا عَٰهَدتُّمۡ وَلَا تَنقُضُواْ ٱلۡأَيۡمَٰنَ بَعۡدَ تَوۡكِيدِهَا وَقَدۡ جَعَلۡتُمُ ٱللَّهَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَفِيلًاۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا تَفۡعَلُونَ
items.tr: And fulfill the covenant of Allah when you have taken it, [O believers], and do not break oaths after their confirmation while you have made Allah, over you, a witness. Indeed, Allah knows what you do

note.axis: Axis 1 — Allah & humanity / Axis 5 — Interpersonal / uqud
note.en: Locus Q 16:91. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill ahd; do not break confirmed oaths; Allah kafil. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:91 — محور 1,5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill ahd; do not break confirmed oaths; Allah kafil)

items.ar: وَلَا تَشۡتَرُواْ بِعَهۡدِ ٱللَّهِ ثَمَنٗا قَلِيلًاۚ إِنَّمَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: And do not exchange the covenant of Allah for a small price. Indeed, what is with Allah is best for you, if only you could know

note.en: Locus Q 16:95. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not sell Allah's ahd for small price. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:95 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not sell Allah's ahd for small price)

items.ar: مَا عِندَكُمۡ يَنفَدُ وَمَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ بَاقٖۗ وَلَنَجۡزِيَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوٓاْ أَجۡرَهُم بِأَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: Whatever you have will end, but what Allah has is lasting. And We will surely give those who were patient their reward according to the best of what they used to do

note.en: Locus Q 16:96. Study gloss (not a translation authority): What is with Allah better than worldly diversion. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:96 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (What is with Allah better than worldly diversion)

items.ar: مَنۡ عَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا مِّن ذَكَرٍ أَوۡ أُنثَىٰ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَلَنُحۡيِيَنَّهُۥ حَيَوٰةٗ طَيِّبَةٗۖ وَلَنَجۡزِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡرَهُم بِأَحۡسَنِ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: Whoever does righteousness, whether male or female, while he is a believer - We will surely cause him to live a good life, and We will surely give them their reward [in the Hereafter] according to the best of what they used to do

note.en: Locus Q 16:97. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Righteous life and good deeds — best reward. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:97 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Righteous life and good deeds — best reward)

items.ar: إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ كَانَ أُمَّةٗ قَانِتٗا لِّلَّهِ حَنِيفٗا وَلَمۡ يَكُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ
items.tr: Indeed, Abraham was a [comprehensive] leader, devoutly obedient to Allah, inclining toward truth, and he was not of those who associate others with Allah

note.en: Locus Q 16:120. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Ibrahim ummah obedient; hanif; awfa bi-ahd. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 16:120 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Ibrahim ummah obedient; hanif; awfa bi-ahd)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 4 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِنۡ أَحۡسَنتُمۡ أَحۡسَنتُمۡ لِأَنفُسِكُمۡۖ وَإِنۡ أَسَأۡتُمۡ فَلَهَاۚ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعۡدُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ لِيَسُـُٔواْ وُجُوهَكُمۡ وَلِيَدۡخُلُواْ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدَ كَمَا دَخَلُوهُ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٖ وَلِيُتَبِّرُواْ مَا عَلَوۡاْ تَتۡبِيرًا
items.tr: [And said], "If you do good, you do good for yourselves; and if you do evil, [you do it] to yourselves." Then when the final promise came, [We sent your enemies] to sadden your faces and to enter the temple in Jerusalem, as they entered it the first time, and to destroy what they had taken over with [total] destruction

note.en: Locus Q 17:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): If you do good you do for yourselves. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 17:7 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (If you do good you do for yourselves)

items.ar: ۞وَقَضَىٰ رَبُّكَ أَلَّا تَعۡبُدُوٓاْ إِلَّآ إِيَّاهُ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَٰنًاۚ إِمَّا يَبۡلُغَنَّ عِندَكَ ٱلۡكِبَرَ أَحَدُهُمَآ أَوۡ كِلَاهُمَا فَلَا تَقُل لَّهُمَآ أُفّٖ وَلَا تَنۡهَرۡهُمَا وَقُل لَّهُمَا قَوۡلٗا كَرِيمٗا
items.tr: And your Lord has decreed that you not worship except Him, and to parents, good treatment. Whether one or both of them reach old age [while] with you, say not to them [so much as], "uff," and do not repel them but speak to them a noble word

note.en: Locus Q 17:23. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Kindness to parents; do not say uff. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 17:23 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Kindness to parents; do not say uff)

items.ar: وَلَا تَقۡرَبُواْ مَالَ ٱلۡيَتِيمِ إِلَّا بِٱلَّتِي هِيَ أَحۡسَنُ حَتَّىٰ يَبۡلُغَ أَشُدَّهُۥۚ وَأَوۡفُواْ بِٱلۡعَهۡدِۖ إِنَّ ٱلۡعَهۡدَ كَانَ مَسۡـُٔولٗا
items.tr: And do not approach the property of an orphan, except in the way that is best, until he reaches maturity. And fulfill [every] commitment. Indeed, the commitment is ever [that about which one will be] questioned

note.en: Locus Q 17:34. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill the ahd; ahd will be questioned. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 17:34 — محور 1,6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill the ahd; ahd will be questioned)

items.ar: وَأَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ إِذَا كِلۡتُمۡ وَزِنُواْ بِٱلۡقِسۡطَاسِ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمِۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞ وَأَحۡسَنُ تَأۡوِيلٗا
items.tr: And give full measure when you measure, and weigh with an even balance. That is the best [way] and best in result

note.en: Locus Q 17:35. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill measure and balance with justice. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 17:35 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill measure and balance with justice)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ إِنَّا لَا نُضِيعُ أَجۡرَ مَنۡ أَحۡسَنَ عَمَلًا
items.tr: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - indeed, We will not allow to be lost the reward of any who did well in deeds

note.en: Locus Q 18:30. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Whoever does righteous deeds — best reward. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 18:30 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Whoever does righteous deeds — best reward)

items.ar: ٱلۡمَالُ وَٱلۡبَنُونَ زِينَةُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ وَٱلۡبَٰقِيَٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابٗا وَخَيۡرٌ أَمَلٗا
items.tr: Wealth and children are [but] adornment of the worldly life. But the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for [one's] hope

note.en: Locus Q 18:46. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Wealth and children adornation; lasting deeds better. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 18:46 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Wealth and children adornation; lasting deeds better)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
items.tr: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise

note.en: Locus Q 19:78. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Has he taken ahd with the Most Merciful unseen. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 19:78 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Has he taken ahd with the Most Merciful unseen)

items.ar: لَّا يَمۡلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
items.tr: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant

note.en: Locus Q 19:87. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Intercession only for who took ahd with Most Merciful. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 19:87 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Intercession only for who took ahd with Most Merciful)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وُدّٗا
items.tr: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection

note.en: Locus Q 19:96. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Those who believe and do righteous — Rahman will grant love. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 19:96 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Those who believe and do righteous — Rahman will grant love)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ غَضۡبَٰنَ أَسِفٗاۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَلَمۡ يَعِدۡكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ وَعۡدًا حَسَنًاۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡعَهۡدُ أَمۡ أَرَدتُّمۡ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ فَأَخۡلَفۡتُم مَّوۡعِدِي
items.tr: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me

note.en: Locus Q 20:86. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Did your Lord fail you in promise after leaving Mosa. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 20:86 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Did your Lord fail you in promise after leaving Mosa)

items.ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهُۥ عَزۡمٗا
items.tr: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination

note.en: Locus Q 20:115. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Ahd taken from Adam; he forgot; no firm resolve. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 20:115 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Ahd taken from Adam; he forgot; no firm resolve)

items.ar: وَأۡمُرۡ أَهۡلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ عَلَيۡهَاۖ لَا نَسۡـَٔلُكَ رِزۡقٗاۖ نَّحۡنُ نَرۡزُقُكَۗ وَٱلۡعَٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰ
items.tr: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness

note.en: Locus Q 20:132. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Command family to prayer; be steadfast. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 20:132 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Command family to prayer; be steadfast)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ ٱلۡفُرۡقَانَ وَضِيَآءٗ وَذِكۡرٗا لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous

note.en: Locus Q 21:48. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Musa and Harun given furqan and reminder. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 21:48 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Musa and Harun given furqan and reminder)

items.ar: وَلَقَدۡ كَتَبۡنَا فِي ٱلزَّبُورِ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ ٱلذِّكۡرِ أَنَّ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِيَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ
items.tr: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants

note.en: Locus Q 21:105. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Righteous inherit the land in Zabur. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 21:105 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Righteous inherit the land in Zabur)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ذَٰلِكَۖ وَمَن يُعَظِّمۡ حُرُمَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ خَيۡرٞ لَّهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦۗ وَأُحِلَّتۡ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمُ إِلَّا مَا يُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ فَٱجۡتَنِبُواْ ٱلرِّجۡسَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَوۡثَٰنِ وَٱجۡتَنِبُواْ قَوۡلَ ٱلزُّورِ
items.tr: That [has been commanded], and whoever honors the sacred ordinances of Allah - it is best for him in the sight of his Lord. And permitted to you are the grazing livestock, except what is recited to you. So avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement

note.en: Locus Q 22:30. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Avoid rjs of idols; fulfill word to Allah. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 22:30 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Avoid rjs of idols; fulfill word to Allah)

items.ar: وَجَٰهِدُواْ فِي ٱللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِۦۚ هُوَ ٱجۡتَبَىٰكُمۡ وَمَا جَعَلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فِي ٱلدِّينِ مِنۡ حَرَجٖۚ مِّلَّةَ أَبِيكُمۡ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَۚ هُوَ سَمَّىٰكُمُ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ مِن قَبۡلُ وَفِي هَٰذَا لِيَكُونَ ٱلرَّسُولُ شَهِيدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَتَكُونُواْ شُهَدَآءَ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِۚ فَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱعۡتَصِمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ هُوَ مَوۡلَىٰكُمۡۖ فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمَوۡلَىٰ وَنِعۡمَ ٱلنَّصِيرُ
items.tr: And strive for Allah with the striving due to Him. He has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty. [It is] the religion of your father, Abraham. Allah named you "Muslims" before [in former scriptures] and in this [revelation] that the Messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people. So establish prayer and give zakah and hold fast to Allah. He is your protector; and excellent is the protector, and excellent is the helper

note.en: Locus Q 22:78. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Strive for Allah as He deserves; complete religion. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 22:78 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Strive for Allah as He deserves; complete religion)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: قَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ
items.tr: Certainly will the believers have succeeded

note.en: Locus Q 23:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Successful indeed are the believers. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 23:1 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Successful indeed are the believers)

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِأَمَٰنَٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رَٰعُونَ
items.tr: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive

note.axis: Axis 1 — Allah & humanity / Axis 5 — Interpersonal / uqud
note.en: Locus Q 23:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Successful believers keep amanat and ahd. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 23:8 — محور 1,5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Successful believers keep amanat and ahd)

items.ar: وَمَن يَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ لَا بُرۡهَٰنَ لَهُۥ بِهِۦ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ
items.tr: And whoever invokes besides Allah another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed

note.en: Locus Q 23:117. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Who invokes besides Allah without proof — account. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 23:117 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Who invokes besides Allah without proof — account)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 5 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَلَا يَأۡتَلِ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡفَضۡلِ مِنكُمۡ وَٱلسَّعَةِ أَن يُؤۡتُوٓاْ أُوْلِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينَ وَٱلۡمُهَٰجِرِينَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۖ وَلۡيَعۡفُواْ وَلۡيَصۡفَحُوٓاْۗ أَلَا تُحِبُّونَ أَن يَغۡفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٌ
items.tr: And let not those of virtue among you and wealth swear not to give [aid] to their relatives and the needy and the emigrants for the cause of Allah, and let them pardon and overlook. Would you not like that Allah should forgive you? And Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 24:22. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not let oaths prevent doing good and reconciling. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 24:22 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not let oaths prevent doing good and reconciling)

items.ar: وَلۡيَسۡتَعۡفِفِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَجِدُونَ نِكَاحًا حَتَّىٰ يُغۡنِيَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبۡتَغُونَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِمَّا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمۡ فَكَاتِبُوهُمۡ إِنۡ عَلِمۡتُمۡ فِيهِمۡ خَيۡرٗاۖ وَءَاتُوهُم مِّن مَّالِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِيٓ ءَاتَىٰكُمۡۚ وَلَا تُكۡرِهُواْ فَتَيَٰتِكُمۡ عَلَى ٱلۡبِغَآءِ إِنۡ أَرَدۡنَ تَحَصُّنٗا لِّتَبۡتَغُواْ عَرَضَ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَمَن يُكۡرِههُّنَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ إِكۡرَٰهِهِنَّ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
items.tr: But let them who find not [the means for] marriage abstain [from sexual relations] until Allah enriches them from His bounty. And those who seek a contract [for eventual emancipation] from among whom your right hands possess - then make a contract with them if you know there is within them goodness and give them from the wealth of Allah which He has given you. And do not compel your slave girls to prostitution, if they desire chastity, to seek [thereby] the temporary interests of worldly life. And if someone should compel them, then indeed, Allah is [to them], after their compulsion, Forgiving and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 24:33. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Marry those who seek marriage; make uqud if chaste. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 24:33 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Marry those who seek marriage; make uqud if chaste)

items.ar: رِجَالٞ لَّا تُلۡهِيهِمۡ تِجَٰرَةٞ وَلَا بَيۡعٌ عَن ذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَإِقَامِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءِ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ يَخَافُونَ يَوۡمٗا تَتَقَلَّبُ فِيهِ ٱلۡقُلُوبُ وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
items.tr: [Are] men whom neither commerce nor sale distracts from the remembrance of Allah and performance of prayer and giving of zakah. They fear a Day in which the hearts and eyes will [fearfully] turn about

note.en: Locus Q 24:37. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Men whom trade does not distract from remembrance. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 24:37 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Men whom trade does not distract from remembrance)

items.ar: ۞وَأَقۡسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ جَهۡدَ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ لَئِنۡ أَمَرۡتَهُمۡ لَيَخۡرُجُنَّۖ قُل لَّا تُقۡسِمُواْۖ طَاعَةٞ مَّعۡرُوفَةٌۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: And they swear by Allah their strongest oaths that if you ordered them, they would go forth [in Allah 's cause]. Say, "Do not swear. [Such] obedience is known. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with that which you do

note.en: Locus Q 24:53. Study gloss (not a translation authority): They swear strongest oaths by Allah to obey Messenger. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 24:53 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (They swear strongest oaths by Allah to obey Messenger)

items.ar: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ لَيَسۡتَخۡلِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ كَمَا ٱسۡتَخۡلَفَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ دِينَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي ٱرۡتَضَىٰ لَهُمۡ وَلَيُبَدِّلَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَوۡفِهِمۡ أَمۡنٗاۚ يَعۡبُدُونَنِي لَا يُشۡرِكُونَ بِي شَيۡـٔٗاۚ وَمَن كَفَرَ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
items.tr: Allah has promised those who have believed among you and done righteous deeds that He will surely grant them succession [to authority] upon the earth just as He granted it to those before them and that He will surely establish for them [therein] their religion which He has preferred for them and that He will surely substitute for them, after their fear, security, [for] they worship Me, not associating anything with Me. But whoever disbelieves after that - then those are the defiantly disobedient

note.en: Locus Q 24:55. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah promised successors on earth if establish worship. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 24:55 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah promised successors on earth if establish worship)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلٗا صَٰلِحٗا فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ حَسَنَٰتٖۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورٗا رَّحِيمٗا
items.tr: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 25:70. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Good deeds replace evil; Allah forgiving merciful. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 25:70 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Good deeds replace evil; Allah forgiving merciful)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: تِلۡكَ ٱلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ نَجۡعَلُهَا لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُرِيدُونَ عُلُوّٗا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا فَسَادٗاۚ وَٱلۡعَٰقِبَةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
items.tr: That home of the Hereafter We assign to those who do not desire exaltedness upon the earth or corruption. And the [best] outcome is for the righteous

note.en: Locus Q 28:83. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Home of akhirah assigned for those not seeking exaltation. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 28:83 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Home of akhirah assigned for those not seeking exaltation)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَٰهَدُواْ فِينَا لَنَهۡدِيَنَّهُمۡ سُبُلَنَاۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَمَعَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
items.tr: And those who strive for Us - We will surely guide them to Our ways. And indeed, Allah is with the doers of good

note.en: Locus Q 29:69. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Strive for Allah; He guides to His paths. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 29:69 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Strive for Allah; He guides to His paths)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِۖ لَا يُخۡلِفُ ٱللَّهُ وَعۡدَهُۥ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: [It is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in His promise, but most of the people do not know

note.en: Locus Q 30:6. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah does not break His promise (wad). Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 30:6 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah does not break His promise (wad))

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ۞وَمَن يُسۡلِمۡ وَجۡهَهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحۡسِنٞ فَقَدِ ٱسۡتَمۡسَكَ بِٱلۡعُرۡوَةِ ٱلۡوُثۡقَىٰۗ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡأُمُورِ
items.tr: And whoever submits his face to Allah while he is a doer of good - then he has grasped the most trustworthy handhold. And to Allah will be the outcome of [all] matters

note.en: Locus Q 31:22. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hold to urwa wuthqa; Allah hearing knowing. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 31:22 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hold to urwa wuthqa; Allah hearing knowing)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 8 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِيُّ ٱتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
items.tr: O Prophet, fear Allah and do not obey the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise

note.en: Locus Q 33:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Obey Allah and Messenger; do not turn away when called. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:1 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Obey Allah and Messenger; do not turn away when called)

items.ar: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ مِيثَٰقَهُمۡ وَمِنكَ وَمِن نُّوحٖ وَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ وَعِيسَى ٱبۡنِ مَرۡيَمَۖ وَأَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُم مِّيثَٰقًا غَلِيظٗا
items.tr: And [mention, O Muhammad], when We took from the prophets their covenant and from you and from Noah and Abraham and Moses and Jesus, the son of Mary; and We took from them a solemn covenant

note.en: Locus Q 33:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Solemn mithaq from prophets including final Messenger. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:7 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Solemn mithaq from prophets including final Messenger)

items.ar: وَلَقَدۡ كَانُواْ عَٰهَدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مِن قَبۡلُ لَا يُوَلُّونَ ٱلۡأَدۡبَٰرَۚ وَكَانَ عَهۡدُ ٱللَّهِ مَسۡـُٔولٗا
items.tr: And they had already promised Allah before not to turn their backs and flee. And ever is the promise to Allah [that about which one will be] questioned

note.en: Locus Q 33:15. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Prior ahd with Allah not to turn backs in battle. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:15 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Prior ahd with Allah not to turn backs in battle)

items.ar: مِّنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ رِجَالٞ صَدَقُواْ مَا عَٰهَدُواْ ٱللَّهَ عَلَيۡهِۖ فَمِنۡهُم مَّن قَضَىٰ نَحۡبَهُۥ وَمِنۡهُم مَّن يَنتَظِرُۖ وَمَا بَدَّلُواْ تَبۡدِيلٗا
items.tr: Among the believers are men true to what they promised Allah. Among them is he who has fulfilled his vow [to the death], and among them is he who awaits [his chance]. And they did not alter [the terms of their commitment] by any alteration

note.en: Locus Q 33:23. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Men true to what they ahadu Allah upon. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:23 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Men true to what they ahadu Allah upon)
