items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ وَٱلۡمُسۡلِمَٰتِ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ وَٱلۡقَٰنِتِينَ وَٱلۡقَٰنِتَٰتِ وَٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ وَٱلصَّـٰدِقَٰتِ وَٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ وَٱلصَّـٰبِرَٰتِ وَٱلۡخَٰشِعِينَ وَٱلۡخَٰشِعَٰتِ وَٱلۡمُتَصَدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُتَصَدِّقَٰتِ وَٱلصَّـٰٓئِمِينَ وَٱلصَّـٰٓئِمَٰتِ وَٱلۡحَٰفِظِينَ فُرُوجَهُمۡ وَٱلۡحَٰفِظَٰتِ وَٱلذَّـٰكِرِينَ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرٗا وَٱلذَّـٰكِرَٰتِ أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٗ وَأَجۡرًا عَظِيمٗا
items.tr: Indeed, the Muslim men and Muslim women, the believing men and believing women, the obedient men and obedient women, the truthful men and truthful women, the patient men and patient women, the humble men and humble women, the charitable men and charitable women, the fasting men and fasting women, the men who guard their private parts and the women who do so, and the men who remember Allah often and the women who do so - for them Allah has prepared forgiveness and a great reward

note.en: Locus Q 33:35. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Muslim men and women — Allah prepared forgiveness. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:35 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Muslim men and women — Allah prepared forgiveness)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَمَلَـٰٓئِكَتَهُۥ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى ٱلنَّبِيِّۚ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ صَلُّواْ عَلَيۡهِ وَسَلِّمُواْ تَسۡلِيمًا
items.tr: Indeed, Allah confers blessing upon the Prophet, and His angels [ask Him to do so]. O you who have believed, ask [Allah to confer] blessing upon him and ask [Allah to grant him] peace

note.en: Locus Q 33:56. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah and angels send blessings upon the Prophet. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:56 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah and angels send blessings upon the Prophet)

items.ar: يُصۡلِحۡ لَكُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ ذُنُوبَكُمۡۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَقَدۡ فَازَ فَوۡزًا عَظِيمًا
items.tr: He will [then] amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly attained a great attainment

note.en: Locus Q 33:71. Study gloss (not a translation authority): He will improve deeds and forgive sins. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:71 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (He will improve deeds and forgive sins)

items.ar: إِنَّا عَرَضۡنَا ٱلۡأَمَانَةَ عَلَى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَٱلۡجِبَالِ فَأَبَيۡنَ أَن يَحۡمِلۡنَهَا وَأَشۡفَقۡنَ مِنۡهَا وَحَمَلَهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ ظَلُومٗا جَهُولٗا
items.tr: Indeed, we offered the Trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains, and they declined to bear it and feared it; but man [undertook to] bear it. Indeed, he was unjust and ignorant

note.en: Locus Q 33:72. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Cosmic amanah offered; human bearing. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 33:72 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Cosmic amanah offered; human bearing)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٞ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ وَإِن تَدۡعُ مُثۡقَلَةٌ إِلَىٰ حِمۡلِهَا لَا يُحۡمَلۡ مِنۡهُ شَيۡءٞ وَلَوۡ كَانَ ذَا قُرۡبَىٰٓۗ إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَۚ وَمَن تَزَكَّىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَتَزَكَّىٰ لِنَفۡسِهِۦۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
items.tr: And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And if a heavily laden soul calls [another] to [carry some of] its load, nothing of it will be carried, even if he should be a close relative. You can only warn those who fear their Lord unseen and have established prayer. And whoever purifies himself only purifies himself for [the benefit of] his soul. And to Allah is the [final] destination

note.en: Locus Q 35:18. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No bearer of burden bears another's burden. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 35:18 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No bearer of burden bears another's burden)

items.ar: ثُمَّ أَوۡرَثۡنَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَيۡنَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَاۖ فَمِنۡهُمۡ ظَالِمٞ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ وَمِنۡهُم مُّقۡتَصِدٞ وَمِنۡهُمۡ سَابِقُۢ بِٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِ بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَضۡلُ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
items.tr: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty

note.en: Locus Q 35:32. Study gloss (not a translation authority): We bequeathed Book to those We chose. Axis 3 addresses Allah's compacts with scripture peoples, especially Bani Israil: charters taken, terms named, breach and consequence recorded. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 3. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 35:32 — محور 3۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (We bequeathed Book to those We chose)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ۞أَلَمۡ أَعۡهَدۡ إِلَيۡكُمۡ يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعۡبُدُواْ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمۡ عَدُوّٞ مُّبِينٞ
items.tr: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy

note.en: Locus Q 36:60. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Ahd with Bani Adam not to worship Shaytan. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 36:60 — محور 1,6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Ahd with Bani Adam not to worship Shaytan)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ لِلنَّاسِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ فَمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ فَلِنَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَإِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيۡهَاۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِوَكِيلٍ
items.tr: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager over them

note.en: Locus Q 39:41. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Quran guidance and healing for believers. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 39:41 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Quran guidance and healing for believers)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ إِنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقّٞۚ فَإِمَّا نُرِيَنَّكَ بَعۡضَ ٱلَّذِي نَعِدُهُمۡ أَوۡ نَتَوَفَّيَنَّكَ فَإِلَيۡنَا يُرۡجَعُونَ
items.tr: So be patient, [O Muhammad]; indeed, the promise of Allah is truth. And whether We show you some of what We have promised them or We take you in death, it is to Us they will be returned

note.en: Locus Q 40:77. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Be patient; promise of Allah is true. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 40:77 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Be patient; promise of Allah is true)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُواْ رَبُّنَا ٱللَّهُ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ تَتَنَزَّلُ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ أَلَّا تَخَافُواْ وَلَا تَحۡزَنُواْ وَأَبۡشِرُواْ بِٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُمۡ تُوعَدُونَ
items.tr: Indeed, those who have said, "Our Lord is Allah " and then remained on a right course - the angels will descend upon them, [saying], "Do not fear and do not grieve but receive good tidings of Paradise, which you were promised

note.en: Locus Q 41:30. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Angels descend on those who say our Lord is Allah. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 41:30 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Angels descend on those who say our Lord is Allah)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَجَابُواْ لِرَبِّهِمۡ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَمۡرُهُمۡ شُورَىٰ بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَمِمَّا رَزَقۡنَٰهُمۡ يُنفِقُونَ
items.tr: And those who have responded to their lord and established prayer and whose affair is [determined by] consultation among themselves, and from what We have provided them, they spend

note.en: Locus Q 42:38. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Respond to Lord; establish prayer; shura among them. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 42:38 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Respond to Lord; establish prayer; shura among them)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَقَالُواْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَ ٱلسَّاحِرُ ٱدۡعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِندَكَ إِنَّنَا لَمُهۡتَدُونَ
items.tr: And they said [to Moses], "O magician, invoke for us your Lord by what He has promised you. Indeed, we will be guided

note.en: Locus Q 43:49. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Invoke Lord by what He ahida with you. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 43:49 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Invoke Lord by what He ahida with you)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَٰهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ وَأَضَلَّهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ عِلۡمٖ وَخَتَمَ عَلَىٰ سَمۡعِهِۦ وَقَلۡبِهِۦ وَجَعَلَ عَلَىٰ بَصَرِهِۦ غِشَٰوَةٗ فَمَن يَهۡدِيهِ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ ٱللَّهِۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
items.tr: Have you seen he who has taken as his god his [own] desire, and Allah has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil? So who will guide him after Allah? Then will you not be reminded

note.en: Locus Q 45:23. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Who follows hawa without guidance from Allah. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 45:23 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Who follows hawa without guidance from Allah)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: قُلۡ مَا كُنتُ بِدۡعٗا مِّنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَمَآ أَدۡرِي مَا يُفۡعَلُ بِي وَلَا بِكُمۡۖ إِنۡ أَتَّبِعُ إِلَّا مَا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
items.tr: Say, "I am not something original among the messengers, nor do I know what will be done with me or with you. I only follow that which is revealed to me, and I am not but a clear warner

note.en: Locus Q 46:9. Study gloss (not a translation authority): I am not first messenger; know not what done with me. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 46:9 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (I am not first messenger; know not what done with me)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: فَإِذَا لَقِيتُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فَضَرۡبَ ٱلرِّقَابِ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَثۡخَنتُمُوهُمۡ فَشُدُّواْ ٱلۡوَثَاقَ فَإِمَّا مَنَّۢا بَعۡدُ وَإِمَّا فِدَآءً حَتَّىٰ تَضَعَ ٱلۡحَرۡبُ أَوۡزَارَهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَلَوۡ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ لَٱنتَصَرَ مِنۡهُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَبۡلُوَاْ بَعۡضَكُم بِبَعۡضٖۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ قُتِلُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَن يُضِلَّ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
items.tr: So when you meet those who disbelieve [in battle], strike [their] necks until, when you have inflicted slaughter upon them, then secure their bonds, and either [confer] favor afterwards or ransom [them] until the war lays down its burdens. That [is the command]. And if Allah had willed, He could have taken vengeance upon them [Himself], but [He ordered armed struggle] to test some of you by means of others. And those who are killed in the cause of Allah - never will He waste their deeds

note.en: Locus Q 47:4. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Wathaq fetters in war context. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: political.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 47:4 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Wathaq fetters in war context)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 4 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ لِيَزۡدَادُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنٗا مَّعَ إِيمَٰنِهِمۡۗ وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
items.tr: It is He who sent down tranquillity into the hearts of the believers that they would increase in faith along with their [present] faith. And to Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth, and ever is Allah Knowing and Wise

note.en: Locus Q 48:4. Study gloss (not a translation authority): He sent sakinah on believers to increase iman. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 48:4 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (He sent sakinah on believers to increase iman)

items.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهُ ٱللَّهَ فَسَيُؤۡتِيهِ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمٗا
items.tr: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to you, [O Muhammad] - they are actually pledging allegiance to Allah. The hand of Allah is over their hands. So he who breaks his word only breaks it to the detriment of himself. And he who fulfills that which he has promised Allah - He will give him a great reward

note.en: Locus Q 48:10. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Bayah to Messenger is bayah to Allah. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 48:10 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Bayah to Messenger is bayah to Allah)

items.ar: ۞لَّقَدۡ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ إِذۡ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحۡتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَأَثَٰبَهُمۡ فَتۡحٗا قَرِيبٗا
items.tr: Certainly was Allah pleased with the believers when they pledged allegiance to you, [O Muhammad], under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquillity upon them and rewarded them with an imminent conquest

note.en: Locus Q 48:18. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah pleased with believers under tree bayah. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 48:18 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah pleased with believers under tree bayah)

items.ar: مُّحَمَّدٞ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلۡكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ تَرَىٰهُمۡ رُكَّعٗا سُجَّدٗا يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنٗاۖ سِيمَاهُمۡ فِي وُجُوهِهِم مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِۚ وَمَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡإِنجِيلِ كَزَرۡعٍ أَخۡرَجَ شَطۡـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسۡتَغۡلَظَ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعۡجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلۡكُفَّارَۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ مِنۡهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٗ وَأَجۡرًا عَظِيمَۢا
items.tr: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in prayer], seeking bounty from Allah and [His] pleasure. Their mark is on their faces from the trace of prostration. That is their description in the Torah. And their description in the Gospel is as a plant which produces its offshoots and strengthens them so they grow firm and stand upon their stalks, delighting the sowers - so that Allah may enrage by them the disbelievers. Allah has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds among them forgiveness and a great reward

note.en: Locus Q 48:29. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Compassion among them; sign for believers. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 48:29 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Compassion among them; sign for believers)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِخۡوَةٞ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَ أَخَوَيۡكُمۡۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
items.tr: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allah that you may receive mercy

note.en: Locus Q 49:10. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Believers are brothers; reconcile between them. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 49:10 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Believers are brothers; reconcile between them)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱجۡتَنِبُواْ كَثِيرٗا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعۡضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثۡمٞۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُواْ وَلَا يَغۡتَب بَّعۡضُكُم بَعۡضًاۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمۡ أَن يَأۡكُلَ لَحۡمَ أَخِيهِ مَيۡتٗا فَكَرِهۡتُمُوهُۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابٞ رَّحِيمٞ
items.tr: O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption. Indeed, some assumption is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother when dead? You would detest it. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is Accepting of repentance and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 49:12. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not spy or backbite — breach of trust. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 49:12 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not spy or backbite — breach of trust)

items.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَرۡتَابُواْ وَجَٰهَدُواْ بِأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَأَنفُسِهِمۡ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
items.tr: The believers are only the ones who have believed in Allah and His Messenger and then doubt not but strive with their properties and their lives in the cause of Allah. It is those who are the truthful

note.en: Locus Q 49:15. Study gloss (not a translation authority): True believers are those who believe and strive. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 49:15 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (True believers are those who believe and strive)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَٱلۡإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُونِ
items.tr: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me

note.en: Locus Q 51:56. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Created jinn and humans except to worship Me. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological, worship.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 51:56 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Created jinn and humans except to worship Me)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: هَلۡ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنُ
items.tr: Is the reward for good [anything] but good

note.en: Locus Q 55:60. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Is reward of good anything but good. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 55:60 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Is reward of good anything but good)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ أَخَذَ مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
items.tr: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers

note.en: Locus Q 57:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): He took your mithaq; why disbelieve. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 57:8 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (He took your mithaq; why disbelieve)

items.ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ أَلَّا تُنفِقُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ لَا يَسۡتَوِي مِنكُم مَّنۡ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبۡلِ ٱلۡفَتۡحِ وَقَٰتَلَۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَعۡظَمُ دَرَجَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدُ وَقَٰتَلُواْۚ وَكُلّٗا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
items.tr: And why do you not spend in the cause of Allah while to Allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth? Not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest [of Makkah] and fought [and those who did so after it]. Those are greater in degree than they who spent afterwards and fought. But to all Allah has promised the best [reward]. And Allah, with what you do, is Acquainted

note.en: Locus Q 57:10. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Spend before death comes; then no delay. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 57:10 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Spend before death comes; then no delay)

items.ar: لَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ وَأَنزَلۡنَا ٱلۡحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأۡسٞ شَدِيدٞ وَمَنَٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعۡلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٞ
items.tr: We have already sent Our messengers with clear evidences and sent down with them the Scripture and the balance that the people may maintain [their affairs] in justice. And We sent down iron, wherein is great military might and benefits for the people, and so that Allah may make evident those who support Him and His messengers unseen. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might

note.en: Locus Q 57:25. Study gloss (not a translation authority): We sent messengers with clear proofs and balance. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 57:25 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (We sent messengers with clear proofs and balance)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمۡ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي ٱلۡمَجَٰلِسِ فَٱفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشُزُواْ فَٱنشُزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
items.tr: O you who have believed, when you are told, "Space yourselves" in assemblies, then make space; Allah will make space for you. And when you are told, "Arise," then arise; Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do

note.en: Locus Q 58:11. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah will raise those who believe and given knowledge. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 58:11 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah will raise those who believe and given knowledge)

items.ar: يَوۡمَ يَبۡعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعٗا فَيَحۡلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحۡلِفُونَ لَكُمۡ وَيَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمۡ عَلَىٰ شَيۡءٍۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡكَٰذِبُونَ
items.tr: On the Day Allah will resurrect them all, and they will swear to Him as they swear to you and think that they are [standing] on something. Unquestionably, it is they who are the liars

note.en: Locus Q 58:18. Study gloss (not a translation authority): They will swear to Allah as they swear to you. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 58:18 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (They will swear to Allah as they swear to you)

items.ar: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوۡمٗا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡأٓخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنۡ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوۡ كَانُوٓاْ ءَابَآءَهُمۡ أَوۡ أَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ أَوۡ إِخۡوَٰنَهُمۡ أَوۡ عَشِيرَتَهُمۡۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٖ مِّنۡهُۖ وَيُدۡخِلُهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَرَضُواْ عَنۡهُۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ حِزۡبُ ٱللَّهِۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزۡبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
items.tr: You will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day having affection for those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. Those - He has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from Him. And We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him - those are the party of Allah. Unquestionably, the party of Allah - they are the successful

note.en: Locus Q 58:22. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No wala for those who oppose Allah and Messenger. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 58:22 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No wala for those who oppose Allah and Messenger)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: مَّآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ فَلِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ وَلِذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَٱبۡنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ كَيۡ لَا يَكُونَ دُولَةَۢ بَيۡنَ ٱلۡأَغۡنِيَآءِ مِنكُمۡۚ وَمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمُ ٱلرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ وَمَا نَهَىٰكُمۡ عَنۡهُ فَٱنتَهُواْۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡعِقَابِ
items.tr: And what Allah restored to His Messenger from the people of the towns - it is for Allah and for the Messenger and for [his] near relatives and orphans and the [stranded] traveler - so that it will not be a perpetual distribution among the rich from among you. And whatever the Messenger has given you - take; and what he has forbidden you - refrain from. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is severe in penalty

note.en: Locus Q 59:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not prefer others over Messenger in decisions. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 59:7 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not prefer others over Messenger in decisions)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَلۡتَنظُرۡ نَفۡسٞ مَّا قَدَّمَتۡ لِغَدٖۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
items.tr: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do

note.en: Locus Q 59:18. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fear Day when no soul suffices another. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 59:18 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fear Day when no soul suffices another)

surahs.en: She that is to be examined
surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 4 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تَتَّخِذُواْ عَدُوِّي وَعَدُوَّكُمۡ أَوۡلِيَآءَ تُلۡقُونَ إِلَيۡهِم بِٱلۡمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدۡ كَفَرُواْ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ يُخۡرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمۡ أَن تُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ خَرَجۡتُمۡ جِهَٰدٗا فِي سَبِيلِي وَٱبۡتِغَآءَ مَرۡضَاتِيۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيۡهِم بِٱلۡمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَآ أَخۡفَيۡتُمۡ وَمَآ أَعۡلَنتُمۡۚ وَمَن يَفۡعَلۡهُ مِنكُمۡ فَقَدۡ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
items.tr: O you who have believed, do not take My enemies and your enemies as allies, extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth, having driven out the Prophet and yourselves [only] because you believe in Allah, your Lord. If you have come out for jihad in My cause and seeking means to My approval, [take them not as friends]. You confide to them affection, but I am most knowing of what you have concealed and what you have declared. And whoever does it among you has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way

note.en: Locus Q 60:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Test regarding taking enemies as allies after mithaq. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 60:1 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Test regarding taking enemies as allies after mithaq)

items.ar: لَّا يَنۡهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يُقَٰتِلُوكُمۡ فِي ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمۡ يُخۡرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِكُمۡ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمۡ وَتُقۡسِطُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُقۡسِطِينَ
items.tr: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly

note.en: Locus Q 60:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah does not forbid kindness to non-belligerent. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 60:8 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah does not forbid kindness to non-belligerent)

items.ar: إِنَّمَا يَنۡهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَٰتَلُوكُمۡ فِي ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخۡرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِكُمۡ وَظَٰهَرُواْ عَلَىٰٓ إِخۡرَاجِكُمۡ أَن تَوَلَّوۡهُمۡۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمۡ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
items.tr: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers

note.en: Locus Q 60:9. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Forbidden alliance with those who fight you for religion. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 60:9 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Forbidden alliance with those who fight you for religion)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِيُّ إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتُ يُبَايِعۡنَكَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن لَّا يُشۡرِكۡنَ بِٱللَّهِ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا يَسۡرِقۡنَ وَلَا يَزۡنِينَ وَلَا يَقۡتُلۡنَ أَوۡلَٰدَهُنَّ وَلَا يَأۡتِينَ بِبُهۡتَٰنٖ يَفۡتَرِينَهُۥ بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِنَّ وَأَرۡجُلِهِنَّ وَلَا يَعۡصِينَكَ فِي مَعۡرُوفٖ فَبَايِعۡهُنَّ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَهُنَّ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
items.tr: O Prophet, when the believing women come to you pledging to you that they will not associate anything with Allah, nor will they steal, nor will they commit unlawful sexual intercourse, nor will they kill their children, nor will they bring forth a slander they have invented between their arms and legs, nor will they disobey you in what is right - then accept their pledge and ask forgiveness for them of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 60:12. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Bayah of believing women upon conditions. Axis 4 covers the Prophet's community bond: bayah, treaties, loyalty limits, and political-social pledges under shar'i bounds. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 4. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 60:12 — محور 4۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Bayah of believing women upon conditions)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلَىٰ تِجَٰرَةٖ تُنجِيكُم مِّنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٖ
items.tr: O you who have believed, shall I guide you to a transaction that will save you from a painful punishment

note.en: Locus Q 61:10. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah's bay: believe and strive for forgiveness. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 61:10 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah's bay: believe and strive for forgiveness)

items.ar: تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَٰهِدُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمۡوَٰلِكُمۡ وَأَنفُسِكُمۡۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
items.tr: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know

note.en: Locus Q 61:11. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Believe in Allah and strive with wealth and lives. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 61:11 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Believe in Allah and strive with wealth and lives)

items.ar: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡ ذُنُوبَكُمۡ وَيُدۡخِلۡكُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ وَمَسَٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةٗ فِي جَنَّـٰتِ عَدۡنٖۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
items.tr: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment

note.en: Locus Q 61:12. Study gloss (not a translation authority): He will forgive sins and admit gardens. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 61:12 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (He will forgive sins and admit gardens)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ قَالُواْ نَشۡهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ ٱللَّهِۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱللَّهُ يَشۡهَدُ إِنَّ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ لَكَٰذِبُونَ
items.tr: When the hypocrites come to you, [O Muhammad], they say, "We testify that you are the Messenger of Allah." And Allah knows that you are His Messenger, and Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars

note.en: Locus Q 63:1. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Hypocrites profess witness that you are Messenger. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 63:1 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Hypocrites profess witness that you are Messenger)

items.ar: ۞وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ تُعۡجِبُكَ أَجۡسَامُهُمۡۖ وَإِن يَقُولُواْ تَسۡمَعۡ لِقَوۡلِهِمۡۖ كَأَنَّهُمۡ خُشُبٞ مُّسَنَّدَةٞۖ يَحۡسَبُونَ كُلَّ صَيۡحَةٍ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ هُمُ ٱلۡعَدُوُّ فَٱحۡذَرۡهُمۡۚ قَٰتَلَهُمُ ٱللَّهُۖ أَنَّىٰ يُؤۡفَكُونَ
items.tr: And when you see them, their forms please you, and if they speak, you listen to their speech. [They are] as if they were pieces of wood propped up - they think that every shout is against them. They are the enemy, so beware of them. May Allah destroy them; how are they deluded

note.en: Locus Q 63:4. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Harsh appearance; speech like blocked wood beams. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 63:4 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Harsh appearance; speech like blocked wood beams)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَن يُؤۡمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ يَهۡدِ قَلۡبَهُۥۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٞ
items.tr: No disaster strikes except by permission of Allah. And whoever believes in Allah - He will guide his heart. And Allah is Knowing of all things

note.en: Locus Q 64:11. Study gloss (not a translation authority): No affliction except by permission of Allah. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 64:11 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (No affliction except by permission of Allah)

items.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ مَا ٱسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ وَٱسۡمَعُواْ وَأَطِيعُواْ وَأَنفِقُواْ خَيۡرٗا لِّأَنفُسِكُمۡۗ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفۡسِهِۦ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
items.tr: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful

note.en: Locus Q 64:16. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fear Allah as He should be feared; listen and obey. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 64:16 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fear Allah as He should be feared; listen and obey)

items.ar: عَٰلِمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
items.tr: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise

note.en: Locus Q 64:18. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah knows what you conceal and declare. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 64:18 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah knows what you conceal and declare)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: فَإِذَا بَلَغۡنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَأَمۡسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعۡرُوفٍ أَوۡ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعۡرُوفٖ وَأَشۡهِدُواْ ذَوَيۡ عَدۡلٖ مِّنكُمۡ وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلشَّهَٰدَةَ لِلَّهِۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ يُوعَظُ بِهِۦ مَن كَانَ يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡأٓخِرِۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجۡعَل لَّهُۥ مَخۡرَجٗا
items.tr: And when they have [nearly] fulfilled their term, either retain them according to acceptable terms or part with them according to acceptable terms. And bring to witness two just men from among you and establish the testimony for [the acceptance of] Allah. That is instructed to whoever should believe in Allah and the Last day. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him a way out

note.en: Locus Q 65:2. Study gloss (not a translation authority): When term ends hold them honorably or release honorably. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 65:2 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (When term ends hold them honorably or release honorably)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: قَدۡ فَرَضَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡ تَحِلَّةَ أَيۡمَٰنِكُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ مَوۡلَىٰكُمۡۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
items.tr: Allah has already ordained for you [Muslims] the dissolution of your oaths. And Allah is your protector, and He is the Knowing, the Wise

note.en: Locus Q 66:2. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Allah ordained release from oaths; keep covenant with Allah. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 66:2 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Allah ordained release from oaths; keep covenant with Allah)

items.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ قُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَأَهۡلِيكُمۡ نَارٗا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلۡحِجَارَةُ عَلَيۡهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٞ شِدَادٞ لَّا يَعۡصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمۡ وَيَفۡعَلُونَ مَا يُؤۡمَرُونَ
items.tr: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded

note.en: Locus Q 66:6. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Protect yourselves and families from Fire. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 66:6 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Protect yourselves and families from Fire)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٖ
items.tr: And indeed, you are of a great moral character

note.en: Locus Q 68:4. Study gloss (not a translation authority): You are upon exalted standard of character. Axis 2 treats prophetic covenants: solemn mithaq upon messengers, continuity of revelation, and fidelity in conveying the charge. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 2. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 68:4 — محور 2۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (You are upon exalted standard of character)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِأَمَٰنَٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رَٰعُونَ
items.tr: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive

note.axis: Axis 1 — Allah & humanity / Axis 5 — Interpersonal / uqud
note.en: Locus Q 70:32. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Keepers of trusts and ahd. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1,5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 70:32 — محور 1,5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Keepers of trusts and ahd)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ۞إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدۡنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَنِصۡفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٞ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحۡصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرۡضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضۡرِبُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَبۡتَغُونَ مِن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنۡهُۚ وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقۡرِضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗاۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرٖ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيۡرٗا وَأَعۡظَمَ أَجۡرٗاۚ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمُۢ
items.tr: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muhammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allah determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur'an. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allah and others fighting for the cause of Allah. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakah and loan Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allah. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful

note.en: Locus Q 73:20. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Recite what is easy of Quran; establish prayer. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 73:20 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Recite what is easy of Quran; establish prayer)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 2 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمٗا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرٗا
items.tr: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread

note.en: Locus Q 76:7. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Fulfill nadhr and fear day of widespread calamity. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 76:7 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Fulfill nadhr and fear day of widespread calamity)

items.ar: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينٗا وَيَتِيمٗا وَأَسِيرًا
items.tr: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive

note.en: Locus Q 76:8. Study gloss (not a translation authority): They give food despite love for it to needy. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 76:8 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (They give food despite love for it to needy)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 3 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَهَٰنَنِ
items.tr: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me

note.en: Locus Q 89:16. Study gloss (not a translation authority): When tried with affliction he despairs and turns ungrateful. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 89:16 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (When tried with affliction he despairs and turns ungrateful)

items.ar: كَلَّاۖ بَل لَّا تُكۡرِمُونَ ٱلۡيَتِيمَ
items.tr: No! But you do not honor the orphan

note.en: Locus Q 89:17. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Do not honor orphan or urge feeding poor. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 89:17 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Do not honor orphan or urge feeding poor)

items.ar: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٞ
items.tr: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers]

note.en: Locus Q 89:26. Study gloss (not a translation authority): None wathaq on that Day except by His permission. Axis 6 orients covenant language toward the akhirah: questioning, purchase, broken promises of Shaytan, and final accountability. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 6. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 89:26 — محور 6۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (None wathaq on that Day except by His permission)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلصَّبۡرِ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلۡمَرۡحَمَةِ
items.tr: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion

note.en: Locus Q 90:17. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Then being among those who believe and counsel patience. Axis 5 spans interpersonal registers: uqud, marriage mithaq, oaths, and amanah rendered among people in Allah's name. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 5. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 90:17 — محور 5۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Then being among those who believe and counsel patience)

surahs.intro: First-edition Mithaq notes for this surah: 1 covenant loci. Commentary is an ijtihadi reading through ahd/mithaq — not a substitute for classical tafsir.

items.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلصَّبۡرِ
items.tr: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience

note.en: Locus Q 103:3. Study gloss (not a translation authority): Except those who believe, do good, counsel truth and patience. Axis 1 maps the bond between Allah and humanity: lordship acknowledged, charges kept or sold, worship aligned with the primordial testimony. Parties and act: identify who binds whom, what speech or charge is taken, and whether the scene is primordial, prophetic, communal, interpersonal, or eschatological. Primary axis tag(s): 1. Registers in view: theological.
note.ur: میثاق نوٹ: ق 103:3 — محور 1۔ تفصیلی مطالعہ انگریزی نوٹ میں ہے۔ (Except those who believe, do good, counsel truth and patience)

items.ar: وَيَمۡنَعُونَ ٱلۡمَاعُونَ
